title: Senior Loan Application Specialist (Pre-Underwriting & Quality Control)
description:
Position:Senior Loan Application Specialist (Pre-Underwriting & Quality Control)



Company: Eaze Consulting Group Inc.



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Work Schedule: Full-Time, Monday–Friday | US Pacific Standard Time (PST) 



Compensation: $900 USD/month (Fixed, paid bi-monthly)



About the Role:

At Eaze Consulting Group, we don’t just "move data"—we architect approvals. We are looking for a Senior Loan Application Specialist who functions as the critical analytical bridge between our sales team and our US lending partners.



You aren't just filling out forms; you are a "Financial Sleuth" tasked with structural integrity. You will audit client data within GoHighLevel (GHL) and Salesforce, identify red flags in financial documents, and proactively "package" files to ensure they are lender-ready before submission. Your goal is to turn "Maybe" into "Approved."



Key Responsibilities:

High-Stakes Pre-Underwriting: Perform an initial credit and risk assessment on all applications. Evaluate files against specific lender "buy boxes" (Credit scores, TIB, Monthly Revenue, etc.).



Strategic System Integration: Execute flawless data migration from GHL/Salesforce into complex lender portals. You are responsible for the 100% accuracy of the digital file.



Financial Forensic Auditing: Perform deep-dive audits on bank statements, tax returns, and P&Ls. You must be able to spot mismatched totals, missing pages, or suspicious transactions that could trigger a lender decline.



File Strengthening & Resolution: Don't just report a problem—solve it. Identify gaps in "borderline" files and coordinate with the sales team to secure the specific supporting evidence needed to mitigate risk.



Lender Liaison: Analyze decline reasons and feedback from lenders. Rework and resubmit files when viable to maximize the company's funding ratio.



Who You Are:

The Analytical Mind: You don't see a checklist; you see a story. You can connect the dots between a bank statement and a tax return to verify true cash flow.



US Market Veteran: You have a minimum of 2+ years of experience in US Merchant Cash Advance (MCA), Small Business Lending, or Mortgages. You understand US-specific financial documents (1040s, 1120s, 4506-T).



Detail-Obsessed: You have a "zero-defect" mentality. You take pride in submitting "clean" files that lenders prioritize because they trust your work.



Requirements

Technical Stack: Hands-on experience with Salesforce and GoHighLevel (GHL) is non-negotiable.



US Lending Knowledge: Strong grasp of US-based credit scoring (FICO), Debt-to-Income (DTI) calculations, and UCC filings.



Communication: Elite English proficiency. You must be able to explain complex file "conditions" clearly to US-based Account Managers via Slack or Zoom.



Infrastructure: A dedicated home office with high-speed fiber internet (min. 50 Mbps) and a reliable power backup (UPS/Generator) to ensure 100% uptime during PST hours.



Flexible PST Schedule: You must work Full-Time during US Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours.



100% Uptime Requirement: You must maintain a dedicated home office with high-speed fiber internet (min. 50 Mbps).



Power Redundancy: A reliable power backup (UPS or Generator) is mandatory to ensure zero downtime during your shift.



Elite "Show-Up" Mentality: You are responsible for the 100% accuracy of digital files and must be available via Slack or Zoom to explain complex conditions to US-based Account Managers in real-time.



How to Apply:

If you are a problem-solver who understands that a "clean file" , we want you on our team.



 your updated CV and a brief summary of your US lending experience to 
 Line: Senior Loan Specialist - [Your Full Name] - [Years of US Lending Experience]

title: Graphic Designer - T-Shirt & Apparel Design
description:
Sacred Honor Apparel is a patriotic-themed apparel brand looking for a highly creative and imaginative Graphic Designer to join our team on a part-time basis. You will play a key role in helping bring our vision to life through bold, compelling, and unique t-shirt designs.



Responsibilities:

- Create original, print-ready t-shirt and apparel graphics based on creative briefs and brand direction

- Collaborate closely with the brand owner to develop concepts from initial idea to finished design

- Produce designs that resonate with patriotic, American history, and motorcycle culture themes

- Prepare files for print production (screen printing, DTG, sublimation, etc.)

- Deliver multiple design concepts and revisions in a timely manner

- Maintain consistency with brand identity and style guidelines



Requirements:

- Highly proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator, or comparable design software (e.g., CorelDRAW, Affinity Designer)

- Strong portfolio demonstrating creativity, imagination, and versatility in graphic design

- Experience with t-shirt or apparel design is a strong plus

- Ability to take a rough concept or idea and transform it into a polished, professional design

- Excellent attention to detail and understanding of color theory, typography, and composition

- Strong communication skills and ability to take creative direction

- Reliable, deadline-driven, and able to work independently



What We're Looking For:

Above all, we need someone who is highly creative and imaginative. You will be relied upon to help bring our vision to life, so we need a designer who can think outside the box, contribute fresh ideas, and produce designs that stand out. If you are passionate about design and take pride in your craft, we want to hear from you.



This position has the potential to become long term or permanent, based on the results of this campaign.



To Apply:

Please include a link to your portfolio or samples of your best work, especially any apparel or t-shirt designs.

title: TikTok & Instagram Reels Editor — Wedding Videos (Ongoing)
description:
About Us

We're a wedding videography company in Austin, Texas. We film beautiful weddings and need someone to turn our raw footage and highlight reels into scroll-stopping TikTok and Instagram Reels content.



What You'll Do



• Take 3–10 minute wedding highlight videos and cut them into 15–60 second TikTok/Reels clips

• Add trending audio, text overlays, transitions, and captions

• Stay current on TikTok wedding trends and what's performing well

• Deliver 2–4 edited clips per week

• Follow our brand style (cinematic, emotional, not overly flashy)



Requirements



• Strong CapCut skills — this is our primary editing tool

• Active TikTok user — you need to know what works on the platform

• Portfolio of TikTok/Reels edits you've done (required to apply)

• Good eye for pacing and music selection

• Reliable internet, able to receive and send large video files

• Available for feedback rounds within 24 hours



Our Style



• Cinematic and emotional, not fast-cut and chaotic

• Music-driven — the edit should feel like a music video

• Text overlays should be minimal and elegant

• We want people to STOP scrolling, not just watch



What We Provide



• Raw footage or existing highlight reels to work from

• Brand guidelines and style reference videos

• Trending audio suggestions

• Clear feedback on every edit

• Weekly payment via PayPal or Wise



How to Apply

Send us:



1. 2–3 examples of TikTok or Reels videos you've edited (links or files)

2. Your TikTok or Instagram handle if you have one

3. One sentence: What makes a wedding TikTok stop someone from scrolling?



Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: General Office Manager
description:
***About the Role***

We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Office Manager to support daily operations, communications, and recruitment coordination.



This role sits at the center of the business. You will be responsible for managing inbound and outbound communication, keeping workflows organized, and ensuring a smooth hiring process. If you are detail-oriented, people-focused, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, this role is for you.



***Key Responsibilities***

1. Communication Management

-Conduct outbound calls for follow-ups, coordination, and scheduling

-Manage shared inboxes and respond to
s in a timely manner

-Route inquiries to the correct tea
mbers

-Maintain organized records and documentation

-Support day-to-day operational coordination

-Track tasks, follow-ups, and internal workflows

-Assist leadership with administrative needs



3. Recruitment Coordination

-Schedule interviews with candidates and hiring managers

-Manage applicant pipelines and status updates

-Coordinate job postings across platforms

-Communicate with candidates throughout the hiring process

-Assist with onboarding coordination

title: Real Estate Underwriting Analyst
description:
Real Estate Underwriting Analyst (Full-Time | Remote | Philippines)



Company: Alpha Capital

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (U.S. Eastern Time)

Position Type: Full-Time



About Us:



Alpha Capital is a U.S.-based real estate investment firm focused on acquiring, operating, and financing multifamily properties across the country.



We are a fast-growing, vertically integrated company with a strong acquisitions team sourcing deals daily. Our goal is to scale to 10,000 units and $1B+ in assets under management.



Why This Role Exists:



Our acquisitions team generates a high volume of deals.



Right now, our sales team is spending too much time underwriting instead of focusing on sourcing and building relationships.



We are hiring an Underwriting Analyst to take over the financial analysis so our team can move faster and close more deals.



Responsibilities:



Underwrite multifamily real estate deals using our Excel models



Review and analyze:



-Rent rolls

-T12 financials

-Offering memorandums (OMs)

-Input and organize data into underwriting spreadsheets



Determine:

-Deal viability

-Target purchase price

-Value-add opportunities

-Risk factors

-Provide clear feedback to the acquisitions team:

-“This deal works at $X”

-“This deal does NOT work because of Y”



Conduct market research:

-Rent comps

-Sales comps

-Expense benchmarks

-Turn around underwriting quickly (same day or within 24 hours)



Requirements (Must Have)



-Advanced Excel skills (formulas, financial modeling, data analysis)

-Experience underwriting real estate deals (multifamily preferred)

-Ability to read and interpret rent rolls and T12s

-Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

-High attention to detail

-Ability to work quickly and meet deadlines

-Experience with U.S. multifamily real estate

-Familiarity with tools like CoStar, LoopNet, Zillow, or similar



Understanding of:

-Cap rates

-Cash-on-cash return

-IRR

-Value-add strategies

-Experience working with a real estate investment firm



What Success Looks Like:



-Deals are underwritten accurately and quickly

-Clear buy/no-buy recommendations are provided

-Models are clean, organized, and easy to review

-Risks and opportunities are clearly identified



Compensation:



Competitive salary (based on experience)



Long-term growth opportunity within the company



Who This Role Is For:

-Detail-oriented and analytical

-Strong in Excel and financial analysis

-Able to work independently and take ownership

-Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment



Who This Role Is NOT For:



-Someone who needs constant supervision

-Someone who is slow or misses details

-Someone without real estate or underwriting experience



How to Apply



Please include:

-Your resume

-A short summary of your real estate underwriting experience. include a smiley face in the subject line 

-(Optional but preferred) Sample Excel or underwriting model you have worked on



If you’re a strong candidate, there is opportunity to grow into a Lead Analyst role as we scale.

title: Phone Research Caller — Healthcare Price Research (US Hours)
description:
We run a healthcare price transparency website in the US. We need someone to call independent clinics and medical offices in Austin, Texas to ask about their cash pay pricing as a potential new patient.



This is simple phone research work. You'll follow a script, fill in a Google Sheet with the prices you find, and report daily.



What You'll Do



• Call clinics from our list (urgent care, chiropractors, dentists, therapists, etc.)

• Ask about cash pay / self-pay pricing as a new patient

• Fill in our Google Sheet with what they quote

• Work 4 hours per day, Monday–Friday

• Target: 25–40 calls per shift



Requirements



• Clear, neutral English accent (American callers preferred but not required)

• Reliable internet and a way to make US calls (we'll provide calling credits via Google Voice or similar)

• Available during US business hours: 9am–1pm or 1pm–5pm Central Time

• Organized — good at filling in spreadsheets accurately

• Honest — we need accurate data, not guesses



What We Provide



• Full call script (no improv needed)

• Google Sheet with clinics to call

• Calling credits for US calls

• Clear instructions and examples

• Weekly payment via PayPal or Wise



How to Apply

Send a short voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself and reading this sentence:



"Hi, I'm calling to ask about your cash pay pricing for a new patient visit. I don't have insurance and I'm wondering what the cost would be."



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Video Editor for Social Media Reels – Must Follow Specific Guidelines
description:
Job Title: Video Editor for Social Media Reels – Must Follow Specific Guidelines



Job Description:

We are looking for a skilled video editor who can follow specific guidelines provided by our social media strategist. The focus will be on creating strong hooks, effective CTAs (calls to action), and sharp cuts to make social media reels stand out.



Requirements:

Proven experience in editing social media reels with a focus on short-form content (Instagram, TikTok, etc.).

Ability to ideate and execute content that aligns with the provided guidelines.

Strong knowledge of creating engaging hooks, concise CTAs, and pacing for high-impact content.

Previous work examples that demonstrate understanding of how to grow social media engagement through effective video editing.



What You'll Do:

Edit reels following a structured plan with specific hooks, CTAs, and cuts.

Ensure the video content feels fresh, engaging, and aligned with the brand’s voice and tone.

Work closely with our social media strategist to refine the content.



Additional Information:

If you feel that you can follow instructions but would prefer a more simplified approach, we are open to collaboration with someone who can help break down complex guidelines into actionable steps.



To Apply: Please provide a sample of your previous work with reels that include hooks, CTAs, and clear pacing, along with any social media growth metrics you've helped achieve.



Test Task: Social Media Reel Editing with Tiered Content Framework



Objective:

Create three 15-30 second social media reels (for Instagram or TikTok) based on a specific topic. Each reel should align with the Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 content strategy, as outlined below.



Guidelines:



Tier 1 - Authority / Educational Reel:



Goal: Establish authority and showcase expertise.



Content Focus: Provide valuable tips, insights, or actionable advice on a topic.



Hook (First 3-5 seconds): Start with a strong statement or a compelling question that showcases your expertise.



CTA (Call-to-Action): Ask the audience to follow for more tips or direct them to a detailed blog or article.



Style: Calm, professional, and expert-led.



Tier 2 - Geo-Anchored / Logistical Reel:



Goal: Highlight location-specific content that resonates with local audiences.



Content Focus: Showcase a local service, event, or relevant area-specific topic.



Hook (First 3-5 seconds): Use a localized approach to grab attention, e.g., "Planning a wedding in Rockleigh, NJ? Here’s why you need the right photographer."



CTA (Call-to-Action): Encourage viewers to reach out for more information or book a consultation.



Style: Informative, relatable, with a touch of local flavor.



Tier 3 - Mirror-Statement / Emotional Reel:



Goal: Connect emotionally with the audience, building empathy or resonance.



Content Focus: Tell a relatable story, share a behind-the-scenes 
nt, or show a meaningful emotional connection.



Hook (First 3-5 seconds): Start with a powerful, emotional 
nt or relatable scenario.



CTA (Call-to-Action): Prompt engagement with a question or an invitation to share their experience.



Style: Empathetic, emotional, and authentic.



Specific Instructions:



Footage: Use either your own footage (if available) or stock footage to fit the content. Incorporate on-screen text where necessary.



Music: Include royalty-free music or audio that fits the tone of the reel (calm for Tier 1, energetic for Tier 2, emotional for Tier 3).



Text Overlays: Include relevant text for key points, especially for Tier 1 and Tier 2 content.



Video Format: Deliver the video in both Instagram Reel (9:16) and TikTok format.



Evaluation Criteria:

Adherence to Tier Framework:

Did the candidate successfully follow the Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 guidelines for content, style, and CTA?



Creativity & Engagement:

How creative was the content? Did it align with the target audience for each tier? How well did it engage viewers?



Technical Skills:

Was the editing smooth? Did the pacing, cuts, and audio work well together? Did they ensure fast transitions to keep the viewer engaged?

title: Marketing Operations Assistant for Author & Speaker Platform
description:
Overview

I'm an author and founder building the infrastructure around my upcoming book launch and speaking platform. I write and speak about personal transformation, and this project is about getting the right systems in place so the work can reach the people who need it most. The core brand foundations are already in place — the website is mostly built, the brand guide is complete, and the manuscript is finished. Now I need a skilled marketing operations assistant to help implement the systems that will support audience growth, launch preparation, and speaking opportunities.



This role is about execution and organization, not strategy. You'll be stepping into a well-defined project with clear deliverables and the opportunity to make a real impact during a pivotal launch phase. I will write copy for website, lead magnet, welcome
 nurture, etc but looking for help building out the back end and templates. I have templates for all brand assets I need built but need help with final formatting and editing in Canva. 



Key Projects



 & Funnel Setup



Build and organize ConvertKit (Kit)
 infrastructure

Create a subscriber tagging system

Implement lead magnet delivery automation

Set up a welcome
 sequence



Website & Landing Pages



Finalize key website pages (book page, speaker page, landing pages)

Connect
 opt-in forms and lead magnets

Support ongoing updates and optimization



Speaker Platform Assets



Format speaker kit and media kit

Organize speaking assets and supporting materials

Help build out the speaker page on the website



Podcast & Speaking Outreach



Research relevant podcasts and speaking opportunities

Build an outreach spreadsheet and contact database

Support outreach organization and tracking



Content Operations



Format newsletters and blog posts for publishing

Create Canva templates for social media content

Assist with content scheduling and organization



Publishing & Author Platform Setup



Support ISBN acquisition and registration

Set up author profiles on key publishing and retail platforms (Amazon Author Central, Goodreads, BookBub, etc.)

Assist with distributor and retailer onboarding tasks

Help organize and track publishing-related documentation and deadlines



Tools We Use



ConvertKit / Kit

Canva

Wix

Google Docs & Sheets

Social media scheduling tools

Slack (primary communication)



Ideal Candidate



Experience supporting creators, coaches, authors, or speakers

Comfortable implementing
 funnels and marketing automation

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Quick to learn new tools and able to work independently

Strong communication and consistent follow-through



Project Structure



I am looking for an initial push of 20-30 hours a week to build the back end but will need ongoing support with my marketing efforts on at least a 10 hour a week basis go forward. I ideally would like to find a long ter
mber of my team as I launch this business to help support me throughout the book launch (Q4 this year) and beyond. 



Since this role is primarily backend and publishing work, I am happy for you to work within your own time zone. What matters most is clear, consistent communication through Slack and that deadlines are met. I am looking for a self starter who can execute tasks with minimum oversight after being given a template and let me know where you hit a road block (i.e. I couldn't complete step 5 of the sign up and this is the question I need an answer to).

title: Full-Time Short Term Rental Front Desk
description:
StayCinci is a fast-growing short-term rental company based in Cincinnati, Ohio. We own and operate a range of high-end homes and apartments across the city, offering five-star experiences to every guest who walks through our (virtual) doors. Our mission is to create unforgettable stays that blend comfort, luxury, and local charm.



OUR COMPANY CULTURE

We’re a fun, energetic team that loves open communication—and throwing in a good joke now and then. We operate with trust and independence. No micromanaging here. Our team is remote and spread across the U.S., but we stay connected through strong systems and shared goal.



JOB DESCRIPTION & MISSION

StayCinci is on the hunt for a Full-Time Rock Star Receptionist with Administrative Skills who can serve as the first point of contact for our guests while also providing crucial support in our daily business operations. In this role, you’ll ensure that every guest enjoys a five-star stay by managing communication and coordination across multiple booking platforms. 



You’ll also work directly with our company founder, Danny Gudorf, to complete a variety of administrative tasks that help keep the business running smoothly. title: Video Editor (DTC eCommerce)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply :

title: Customer Service Manager (DTC eCommerce)
description:
FULL-TIME, LONG-TERM, EXCLUSIVE ROLE ONLY

No part-time work, agency setups, or side commitments.



We are a fast-growing supplement brand looking for a Customer Support Manager who is genuinely obsessed with efficiency and continuous improvement. This is not a role for someone who just wants to maintain the status quo or follow a manual. We need a leader who looks at a process and immediately thinks of three ways to make it faster, smarter, and better.



You will be responsible for building and scaling our support operations. We want someone who takes deep pride in ownership, turns chaos into systems, and ensures our customer experience is a competitive advantage. If you are a builder who thrives on fixing broken workflows and implementing high-level strategy, we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do



* Optimize & Implement: You will be the architect of our CS roadmap, constantly auditing and improving systems to ensure we stay ahead of our growth.

* System Ownership: Beyond just managing tickets, you will create, improve, and maintain our entire library of SOPs, macros, and internal documentation.

* Problem Identification: You will proactively identify patterns in customer friction and work across departments to solve issues at the root.

* Tech Stack Management: Take full ownership of our tools (Gorgias, Shopify, etc.), ensuring all automations, rules, and integrations are running at peak performance.

* Accountability: Own the department KPIs (CSAT, Resolution Time, Efficiency) and use data to drive every decision you make.

* Hiring: Hire, promote, and remove underperformers to maintain a high-output, accountable team culture

* Lead by Example: Set the standard for communication and problem-solving, eventually leading the hiring and training as the team scales.



Qualifications



* 5+ years leading customer service teams of 15+ in a fast-paced eCommerce environment

* Obsession with Improvement: You must be able to demonstrate how you have personally improved a system, workflow, or department in a previous role.

* Shopify Expert: Strong hands-on experience with Shopify and its ecosystem of apps.

* Tool Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar platforms, specifically in building out automations and complex workflows.

* Strategic Thinker: Ability to translate raw data into actionable process changes.

* Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English with the ability to lead with authority and clarity.

* Commitment: Willingness to commit full-time and exclusively to our brand for the long term.



This Role is Not for You If:



* You view this as "just a job" rather than something you take personal pride in building

* You need step-by-step direction and shy away from strategic decisions

* You're uncomfortable holding people accountable or addressing underperformance

* You present problems instead of solving them

* You want a comfortable, predictable 9-to-5 job

description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset-based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our strength comes from reliable carrier partnerships, disciplined execution, and scalable capacity across the U.S.



As our network continues to expand, we’re looking for a Carrier Sales Representative to help us build strong, long-term relationships with carriers and support clean, on-time freight execution. If you enjoy structured outbound work, building partnerships, and working in a fast-paced logistics environment this role offers clear expectations, measurable growth, and career advancement.



Role Overview

This role combines carrier network expansion and load coverage execution.



Carrier Development (Network Growth)

You will be responsible for:

• Reach out to 20-50 carriers daily to introduce GH Logistics

• Verify carriers for insurance, authority, safety, and compliance

• Complete carrier onboarding and setup documentation

• Educate carriers on our lanes and freight opportunities

• Position carriers for repeat, long-term business, not one time loads

• Create at least 1 group chat per onboarded carrier daily

• Send mass
s to carrier lists to support load coverage

• Maintain organized activity tracking and communication logs



Carrier Sales (Coverage & Execution)

• Cover shipments using GH approved carriers

• Source capacity through calls, load boards, and existing contacts

• Book at least 1 load through approved carriers

• Secure at least 1 dedicated lane per week through repeat carrier usage

• Manage carrier communication through structured group chats

• Follow up to create recurring lane opportunities

• Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth execution

• Update and maintain tracking spreadsheets daily with accurate activity data



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent 20-50 calls daily

• At least 5 quality carriers onboarded and activated regularly

• Carriers are fully set up, connected, and positioned for repeat freight

• Loads covered on time with clean communication

• Communication is centralized, documented, and reliable

• Carriers move from onboarding to activation to recurring usage



Who We’re Looking For

• Have experience in Carrier Sales, Dispatch, Freight Brokerage, or Trucking Operations

• Comfortable making 20 - 50 outbound calls per day

• Highly organized, tech savvy, and able to manage multiple spreadsheets and group chats

• Type at least 50 WPM

• Thrives in a fast paced and high urgency freight environment

• Communicate professionally via phone, chat, and

• Performance driven and KPI oriented

• Capable of leading structured carrier conversations and daily meetings

• Follows instructions consistently and executes with precision

• Team oriented, coachable, and open to feedback without ego



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time | Monday Friday

• 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (San Antonio time)

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom based work environment (with camera open and unmuted audio)

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



Compensation & Growth

• Starting Base: $8/hour (Up to $10/hour inclusive of performance incentives)

• Performance Incentives: Based on carrier onboarding, activation, and load execution

• Career Path: Carrier Development to Senior Carrier Rep to Account Manager. We promote based on performance and consistency.



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance based advancement



If you’re looking for a role where effort is recognized and growth is tied to output, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply Now: 
/team/
/GHApplicationForm

title: Real Estate Cold Caller (Work From Home | Long-Term Position)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based real estate investment company looking for a reliable and motivated Cold Calling Virtual Assistant to join our team long-term.



Your main responsibility will be calling homeowners in the United States to identify individuals who may be interested in selling their property.



We are looking for someone who is confident speaking with people, dependable, and comfortable making outbound calls daily.



This is a stable, long-term work-from-home opportunity for the right candidate.



Responsibilities:

- Make outbound calls to property owners using our dialing system

- Speak with homeowners professionally

- Identify motivated property sellers

- Collect basic property information

- Enter lead details into our CRM

- Transfer qualified leads to our acquisitions team

- Maintain consistent daily calling activity



Requirements:

- Clear and understandable English

- Neutral or easy-to-understand accent

- Previous cold calling or sales experience preferred

- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Laptop or desktop computer

- Noise-canceling headset

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls



Compensation:

$2 - $4 USD per hour (based on experience and performance)

Weekly pay

Performance bonus opportunities available

Long-term employment opportunity



Work Schedule:

- 40 hours per week preferred

- Must be available during U.S. calling hours



To Apply:



Please include the following:



1. Resume

2. Description of your cold calling experience

3. Computer and headset specifications

4. Short voice recording introducing yourself as if calling a homeowner

title: Graphic/Digital Creator for Non-Profit Organization
description:
Job Posting: Digital Creator for Non-Profit Organization



Position: Digital Creator



About Us

We are a dedicated non-profit organization seeking a skilled and creative Digital Creator to join our team. Our mission is to create impactful and meaningful content that aligns with our Biblical Christian values.

 

Job Description

In this role, you will be responsible for creating and designing digital pages that include elements such as ephemera, background papers, pockets, and folds. You will also design the flow of the project to match the biblical lesson using given scripture references. It is crucial that clip art pages accompany the packets and blend nicely with the junk journal, matching the verse and including the verse for crafters to use in their creations. Additionally, all color swatches must coordinate cohesively and align with the theme of each month's packet and lesson.



As a Digital Creator, you will be responsible for producing high-quality digital content using Adobe, MidJourney, Canva, and AI image tools. You will work independently, manage your assignments through Trello, and maintain clear communication with our team via FB Messenger and Trello. This is a project-based role, and compensation will be provided per completed project.  We create digital junk journal projects to match Biblical lessons.  Knowledge of folio kits, graphics, templates would be of great advantage.

 

Responsibilities

• Create digital pages using Adobe, MidJourney, Canva Layering, and AI image tools.

• Ensure all content is high-quality and aligns with our organization's values.

• Communicate effectively with the team through FB Messenger and Trello.

• Upload completed projects to Google Drive in various formats (PDF, JPEG with and without watermark, and mockup of 

        product).

• Complete a test project to demonstrate skills and capabilities.



Requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe, Advanced Canva Skills, and AI image tools.

• Strong English language skills.

• Ability to work independently and manage assignments through Trello.

• Background in Biblical Christian values.

• Good communication skills and timely project completion.



Compensation

You will be compensated at a rate of $1.00 per completed page. Each project comprises 30 to 50 pages. Payments will be made through PayPal upon project completion, approval, and necessary revisions, in compliance with U.S. and our non-profit status. Qualified candidate will also be eligible to receive quarterly bonus based on team outcomes.



Application Process

To apply, please submit your resume and portfolio to 
 and once we review this, we will determine if you will be sent the project. We are looking for candidates who demonstrate excellent communication skills, the ability to meet deadlines, and a strong alignment with our mission and Christian values.



We look forward to reviewing your application and potentially welcoming you to our team.



Sincerely,

Tammy Becker

Founder of You Ministries
salary: per project payment and Quartey bonus...

title: Shopify Developer
description:
The Shopify Developer will be responsible for developing, customizing, and maintaining Shopify stores to ensure optimal functionality, performance, and user experience. This role focuses on building and modifying Shopify themes, implementing custom features, integrating third-party tools, and troubleshooting technical issues.



You will collaborate closely with designers, marketers, and eCommerce teams to deliver scalable solutions that improve store performance, streamline operations, and enhance the customer shopping experience. The ideal candidate has strong experience in Shopify development, Liquid templating, and front-end technologies.



Key Responsibilities:

- Develop, customize, and maintain Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

- Build and implement custom Shopify features and functionalities based on business requirements

- Optimize site performance, speed, mobile responsiveness, and overall store functionality

- Develop and manage Shopify API integrations with third-party tools, apps, and external platforms

- Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues, bugs, and compatibility problems across devices and browsers

- Collaborate with design and marketing teams to implement high-quality storefront designs

- Create and maintain custom sections, templates, and reusable theme components

- Implement conversion-focused UI/UX improvements and support A/B testing initiatives

- Manage and configure Shopify apps, plugins, and integrations

- Support store migrations, theme upgrades, and feature deployments

- Ensure code quality, scalability, and maintainability through proper documentation and best practices

- Assist in performance monitoring and optimization, including page speed improvements

- Maintain version control and follow development workflows and deployment processes



Qualifications:

- Proven experience as a Shopify Developer or similar eCommerce development role.

- Strong proficiency in Shopify Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Shopify theme architecture.

- Experience building and customizing Shopify themes and storefronts

- Knowledge of Shopify APIs, webhooks, and third-party integrations

- Experience with Shopify apps, app configuration, and platform extensions

- Familiarity with version control systems (Git) and development workflows

- Understanding of responsive design, cross-browser compatibility, and performance optimization

- Experience with Shopify Plus features is a plus

- Knowledge of SEO best practices for Shopify

- Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills

- Excellent problem-solving abilities and attention to detail

- Strong communication and collaboration skills

- Ability to manage multiple development tasks and meet deadlines



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

title: DSP Strategist
description:
We are looking for a DSP Strategist who combines strong brand management and strategic marketing skills with a solid understanding of digital advertising. In this role, you’ll own the planning, strategy, and campaign oversight for our programmatic display and performance campaigns. The ideal candidate thrives at the intersection of brand growth and data-driven marketing, translating insights into actionable campaign strategies that drive measurable business outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and execute comprehensive DSP campaign strategies that align with brand objectives and business goals.

- Collaborate closely with the DSP Manager to ensure campaigns are optimized for performance while staying on-brand.

- Act as the bridge between brand vision and programmatic execution, providing insights and recommendations for targeting, creatives, and messaging.

- Monitor campaign performance, analyze trends, and report actionable insights to stakeholders.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (marketing, creative, analytics) to ensure consistency and effectiveness of campaigns.

- Identify opportunities for campaign growth, testing, and innovation within programmatic channels.

- Oversee budget allocation and pacing to maximize ROI across campaigns.

- Stay current with programmatic advertising trends, tools, and industry best practices to maintain a competitive advantage.



Qualifications:

- 3–5 years of experience in brand management, digital marketing, or programmatic advertising strategy.

- Strong understanding of DSP platforms, programmatic media, and performance marketing principles.

- Excellent analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable marketing insights.

- Experience collaborating with cross-functional teams to execute integrated marketing campaigns.

- Preferred:

          - Experience in e-commerce or DTC brand marketing.

          - Familiarity with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau, or equivalent).

          - Previous experience managing paid media campaigns with significant budgets.

          - Knowledge of emerging advertising technologies and trends in programmatic marketing.

- Strategic thinker with a strong sense of brand and consumer behavior.

- Strong communication and presentation skills for internal and external stakeholders.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

title: Business Analyst
description:
We are seeking a highly strategic, tech-forward Business Analyst to serve as the connective tissue between stakeholders, operations, and IT execution. This role is responsible for identifying business bottlenecks, architecting scalable system solutions, and driving technology initiatives that elevate performance across the entire organization.



This is not a passive documentation role. This person must think like an operator.



The ideal candidate understands Agency operations deeply, sees operational inefficiencies before they become problems, and can translate business complexity into executable IT projects. Amazon account management, listing optimization, and PPC experience is a strong asset. They must be comfortable challenging assumptions, aligning leadership on priorities, and guiding technical teams toward high-impact outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead discovery sessions to uncover operational constraints and workflow inefficiencies.

- Analyze processes end-to-end, mapping current and future workflows for scalability.

- Translate business challenges into project charters, requirements, and actionable plans.

- Collaborate with IT to validate feasibility, manage resources, and oversee execution.

- Identify automation and AI opportunities to improve operations, reporting, and content.

- Enhance systems, dashboards, CRMs, and cross-platform integrations for efficiency.

- Develop scalable SOPs, optimize workflows, and increase output without adding headcount.

- Serve as liaison between technical and non-technical teams, driving alignment and supporting change management.



Qualifications:

- 4+ years experience in Business Analysis, Systems Strategy, Operations Strategy, or similar high-impact role

- Strong working knowledge of Amazon Seller Central and/or Vendor Central operations

- Proven experience leading cross-functional IT initiatives from discovery to launch

- Strong technical literacy (APIs, automation tools, CRM systems, system integrations)

- Experience working directly with developers and technical teams

- Strong documentation and process-mapping skills

- Excellent executive-level communication and stakeholder management skills

- Strategic thinker with the ability to balance short-term fixes with long-term scalability

- Computer engineering/science background or equivalent experience



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

title: Creative Generalist & Creative Strategist
description:
CREATIVE GENERALIST



We’re hiring a Creative Generalist with strong design and video editing chops to produce compelling visual assets for our paid media campaigns, landing pages, and brand communication. This hybrid role supports 2–3 DTC brands to start and is perfect for someone who thrives on fast-paced creative production, balancing aesthetics with performance goals. You’ll be responsible for creating everything from static ads and animated social assets to UGC edits and conversion-driven landing page graphics.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design static, motion, and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, and Google

- Edit high-performing UGC ads with strong hooks, CTAs, captions, and transitions

- Repurpose testimonials, reviews, and influencer content for paid and organic use

- Create
, SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

- Stylize social proof assets (e.g., screenshots, quotes) into branded, engaging formats

- Follow platform-specific best practices for ad creatives

- Ensure design supports performance goals like ROAS and CAC

- Maintain brand consistency across diverse formats and placements

- Collaborate with media buyers, marketers, and creatives to meet campaign goals

- Stay current with trends in ad design and DTC creative performance



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design and video editing for digital marketing.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

- Proven experience creating high-converting static and motion ads for Meta, TikTok, or Google.

- Strong eye for layout, color, typography, and brand consistency.

- Experience editing UGC and social proof content for performance-driven campaigns.

- Able to follow creative briefs, meet tight deadlines, and collaborate well with remote teams.

- Portfolio demonstrating versatility across static design, motion, and video editing.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

- Ability to drive creative decisions that enhance campaign effectiveness and conversion rates.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

title: Senior Developer & IT Documentation Specialist
description:
SENIOR DEVELOPER



We are looking for a Senior Developer who is a versatile, all-around technical expert capable of managing end-to-end development of systems, applications, and web platforms. The ideal candidate thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable supporting cross-functional teams with both front-end and back-end solutions, system integrations, automation, and technical troubleshooting.



This role requires a highly organized, detail-oriented, and technology-focused professional who can communicate effectively across teams, manage complex workflows, and adapt quickly to new tools and processes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Full-Stack Development & Systems Management: Design, develop, and maintain web applications, internal tools, and CMS platforms (especially WordPress); build front-end and back-end functionality, troubleshoot issues, and document systems for team accessibility.

- Integrations & Automation: Implement API integrations, database connections, and workflow automation using tools like Zapier; maintain and support company software and applications across multiple platforms.

- Data Analysis & Reporting: Analyze data, create dashboards and visualizations, and use reporting tools to support decision-making while ensuring system security and compliance.

- Collaboration & Team Support: Work closely with marketing, operations, and leadership teams; communicate technical solutions clearly; provide guidance, mentorship, and contribute to process improvements.

- Onboarding & Knowledge Sharing: Train tea
mbers, document workflows and technical tools, and support ad-hoc tasks to improve team efficiency and continuity.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in full-stack development or systems development, including front-end and back-end technologies.

- Proficiency in WordPress and other CMS platforms.

- Strong understanding of IT procedures, system architecture, and security practices.

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, Excel, and data visualization tools.

- Experience with APIs, database integration, and automation tools (Zapier, HubSpot, Airtable).

- Excellent analytical, logical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

- Strong attention to detail, organization, and ability to prioritize tasks.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.

- Ability to work independently and effectively in a remote work environment.

- Strong interpersonal skills and cross-team collaboration abilities.



Nice to have:

- Experience with Amazon Seller Central, Helium 10, or other e-commerce platforms.

- Familiarity with project management tools like 
, Asana, Slack, and Time Doctor.

- Knowledge of security protocols and IT compliance standards.

- Experience in digital marketing technology applications and online marketing workflows.

- Understanding of cloud-based systems and SaaS platforms.





-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





IT DOCUMENTATION SPECIALIST



The IT Documentation Specialist will create, update, and maintain documentation related to IT systems and processes. This will include writing Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), creating flow charts, and troubleshooting IT documents to ensure accuracy and compliance. This role will serve as a primary technical resource for updates to the relevant documentation.



Responsibilities:

- Identify the need for, and create documents related to, IT systems and processes.

- Document IT processes such as business requirements, design reviews, system setup, configuration, user access, and security.

- Write SOPs to ensure processes are well documented.

- Create flow charts and other visuals to improve readability.

- Review and monitor documentation for accuracy and changes as needed.

- Respond promptly to requests for updates or new documents.

- Stay up to date on IT system processes and trends.

- QA Tasks to ensure that tasks are error-free

- Proactively contribute to providing strategies for training and upskill advancements

- Always come prepared

- Assignments are properly actioned and handled per mag standards

- Act as a direct liaison between end users and IT, and help share knowledge in the org through documentation



Qualifications:

- 1+ years of experience in a similar role

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, computer science, or other relevant fields

- Exceptional communication capabilities, both written and verbal

- Ability to multitask and prioritize

- Proven ability to understand and write technical documents

- In-depth knowledge of IT systems and processes

- Proficient with Microsoft Office, G Suite applications, and computer security systems

- Proficient with, or able to quickly become proficient with, a range of general and specialized applications, software, and hardware used in the organization and the industry.

- Expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies



What We Offer:

title: Marketing Systems & Growth Architect
description:
The Marketing Systems & Growth Architect will own, rebuild, and scale My Amazon Guy’s marketing infrastructure, with a primary focus on HubSpot architecture, lifecycle automation, attribution clarity, and governance standards. This is a systems-first, hands-on role responsible for transforming our CRM and marketing automation ecosystem into a clean, scalable, revenue-driving engine. This is not a brand marketing or campaign execution role. This is a technical marketing systems leadership position focused on structure, integrity, and long-term scalability.



Key Responsibilities:

- Audit, clean, and restructure CRM data, workflows, lifecycle stages, and automation

- Remove deprecated assets, deduplicate records, and eliminate redundant processes

- Establish clear lifecycle definitions, segmentation logic, and governance standards

- Build intent-based segmentation and automated journeys tied to revenue movement

- Align marketing automation with sales handoffs and outbound outreach

- Prevent overlapping messaging and ensure accurate intent-driven actions

- Standardize tracking, UTMs, and attribution across marketing and sales platforms

- Improve visibility into MQL ? SQL ? Opportunity progression and reporting accuracy

- Reduce unnecessary broadcast activity and reporting ambiguity

- Implement request protocols, documentation, and long-term system governance



Qualifications:

- 5+ years in Marketing Operations, RevOps, or Marketing Technology

- Deep, hands-on HubSpot experience (required)

- Proven experience cleaning and restructuring complex CRM environments

- Strong understanding of paid media funnels and conversion tracking

- Experience with lifecycle marketing, lead scoring, and segmentation frameworks

- Experience building or restructuring automation systems

- Comfortable enforcing governance and setting system standards

- Experience working with distributed teams (Filipino team experience preferred)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative & Business Development Representative
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.





--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



Do you enjoy doing sales while collaborating with people? How about doing content on TikTok, Instagram, or on Loom? Can you express yourself fluently in English? If you said yes to all three, My Amazon Guy has the perfect job offer for you!



In summary, you will record tutorials or audits using Loom to get sales leads for our Agency. You will be setting up appointments, and doing
 management to schedule prospective clients w/ our Sales Managers.



If you are direct and to the point, you will fit in at MAG!



Key Responsibilities:

- Send a minimum of 17 videos daily or 85 videos weekly

- 2 Booked Calls Per Week

- Call 14-18 prospects to follow up daily.

- Send daily reports to your assigned direct manager/supervisor

- Keep an eye on Slack, especially Sales channels

- Attend weekly sync with the Business Development Representatives (BDR) Team

- Attend a one-on-one meeting with the BDR Team Lead

- Watch 5 different people's videos every week.

- Complete at least 4 MAG courses



Qualifications:

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern
description:
AMAZON BRAND MANAGER



We are looking for a talented and versatile Amazon Brand Manager! If you think that you have what it takes to be successful in this role, we welcome you to apply!



Do you like going from one meeting to another with non-stop action and solving problems every day while managing 8 people? Where you are trying to please clients and juggling tons of competing priorities? If so, this is the job for you.



Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.



Responsibilities:

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

- You can have your OWN Amazon selling business and utilize company resources to build your own account! We love and ? encourage entrepreneurs, in fact, the majority of employees have their own selling accounts!

- Unlimited Learning and Growth – If you meet and exceed our core values and grow sales, you will have unlimited opportunities to grow, advance, promote, and earn more.

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- Permanent WFH setup

- The work schedule is in Eastern Standard Time (Monday to Friday only)

- A dual-monitor setup is required (at least 8GB of RAM)

- Good quality camera and microphone

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Must consistently maintain good performance and seek skills development for professional growth.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





AMAZON BRAND MANAGER INTERN



Want to catapult out of that “Walmart uniform” and into a world of digital marketing?



We're hiring a Brand Manager Intern at our agency. If you're a tech-savvy gamer who thrives amidst organized chaos, then you are the one that we are looking for!



We will train you how to manage people effectively, communicate better with clients, and navigate tools such as Slack smoothly, while you work at home on your computer. You also get to learn how to sell on Amazon which is the number 1 wealth generation platform in the USA for beginners.



Here's what you'd be doing with us:

- Mastermind core services like PPC, SEO, Design, Catalog merchandising, and troubleshoot like a pro.

- Take charge of at least 8-10 accounts in Seller Central Accounts under a Brand Manager.

- Be the communication bridge between clients and our agency.

- Train and mentor at least 2 AS Intern/BM Intern.



Yes, it's challenging. Yes, it's exciting. Yes, it could be the start of your new career!



We will train you on everything. MAG is an education company and we find it’s easier to find the right culture fit and then train the skills than the other way around.



We're looking for:

- High Drive

- Friendly Introverts

- Strategic Communication Skills

- Ability to take charge, and follow through on a plan



So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.



Expectations:

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- You work on your own computer and dual monitors

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Know how to use basic Google Sheets and Excel functions



You’ve got the talent—we’ve got the opportunity. Take control of your career and apply now!



For any questions or follow-ups,
 us at

title: Investment Research Associate
description:
Research and identify potential real estate and hospitality investment opportunities through industry platforms, broker listings, and other relevant sources.



Track and record new opportunities in the company’s deal tracking system.



Data Collection and Organization

Collect and organize key information for each opportunity, including:

Property details

Market and location data

Financial performance information

Pricing and valuation information

Ensure all data is entered accurately and kept well organized.



Financial Metrics Tracking

Review available financial materials and extract important financial metrics.

Track key indicators such as revenue, operating income, profitability, and valuation metrics to help the acquisitions team quickly review opportunities.



Market and Operational Research

Conduct research related to the operating environment of potential investments, including market conditions, labor trends, and local operating costs.

This research provides additional context for evaluating opportunities.



Industry Trend Monitoring

Monitor relevant industry KPIs, benchmarks, and market trends that may impact investment opportunities or property performance.



Broker and Industry Communication

Request additional information from brokers or industry contacts when needed to complete research on a potential opportunity.

All communication should be professional and for preliminary investment research purposes.



Documentation and File Management

Maintain organized records of all research materials and supporting documents.

Ensure files and information related to each opportunity are stored and easy to access.



Weekly Research Reporting

Prepare a weekly summary of researched opportunities.

Highlight opportunities that appear most relevant for further review and include key financial metrics for the acquisitions team.

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
Do you find joy in building meaningful client relationships, supporting their success, and being a trusted guide as they reach their goals? If you’re someone who thrives on connection and collaboration, we’d be delighted to welcome you to our team!



About Us:



Kalicube is a premium Digital Branding Consultancy for entrepreneurs in the AI era. Leveraging 9.4 billion data points, Kalicube gives entrepreneurs unprecedented control over how they're represented to decision-makers online through visible, influential personal brands that open doors rather than close them. Kalicube is the powerhouse of Knowledge Panel and Brand SERP services.



Job Summary:



At Kalicube, our clients’ success is at the heart of everything we do. As a Customer Success Specialist, you’ll be their trusted advocate, helping them achieve their Brand SERP and Knowledge Panel goals. This role is all about building lasting relationships, providing proactive support, and guiding clients so they gain the full value of Kalicube’s services and the Kalicube Pro SaaS platform.



Your Key Responsibilities:



Be the primary point of contact for a portfolio of Kalicube clients, fostering trust and strong relationships.

Lead onboarding for new clients, ensuring they feel confident and supported from day one.

Proactively connect with clients to understand their goals and help them get the most out of Kalicube’s services and software.

Manage essential account setup and maintenance tasks, such as accurately classifying page types in the Kalicube Pro platform.

Create and adapt client-specific playbooks (using company templates) to provide clear, tailored roadmaps.

Respond promptly and helpfully to client questions via
, chat, and video calls.

Share best practices on Brand SERPs and Knowledge Panels using Kalicube’s proven methodology.

Monitor client health and platform usage to identify and address potential issues early.

Collect and share client feedback to support continuous improvement of our products and services.

Keep accurate, detailed records of client interactions and progress in our CRM.



Skills and Traits:



Excellent written and spoken English with proactive and clear communication.

Strong interpersonal skills with a genuine passion for relationships, empathy, and helping others succeed.

Highly organized with the ability to balance client-facing and internal tasks effectively.

Careful attention to detail, especially in process-driven work like data classification and documentation.

Professional maturity and resilience — able to stay composed and positive in a fast-paced environment.

Logical, objective approach to solving problems and making decisions.

Comfortable learning and working with new software platforms quickly.

Previous experience in customer service, customer success, or account management is a plus, but not required.

Genuine interest in digital marketing, SEO, or online brand management.



What Kalicube Offers:



Work Arrangement: 100% remote, 40 hours a week

Starting Salary: 91USD/week, paid weekly

Salary Review: After 3 months subject for salary increase

Internet Subsidy: Paid monthly, after 3 months

Paid Vacation: 2 weeks of paid vacation after 12 months

SSS, Pag-ibig and PhilHealth: Contributions paid monthly, after 3 months

Bonus: 13th-month bonus, prorated

Career Growth: Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

Work Atmosphere: Courageous, smart, fun, family-friendly, and diverse.



You won’t just join a team—you’ll be part of a supportive family that truly cares about your growth and success. If you’re ready to share your Customer Success expertise with a company that values people as much as client outcomes, we’d be excited to receive your application!

To maximize your chances of moving forward, please review the full job details and ensure you read and follow the application instructions provided in this document:

title: Technical Support Specialist (Open to Fresh Graduates)
description:
IMPORTANT — REVIEW BEFORE APPLYING



We are prioritizing only candidates who are recent graduates of Computer Science or any IT-related degree program. Applicants must already understand the fundamentals of how websites and online platforms operate.



Although this is a junior-level role and training will be provided, applicants are expected to have working knowledge of essential web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript before starting.



HOW TO APPLY

To ensure your application is reviewed, please carefully follow the instructions below. Applications that do not follow these steps may not be considered.

        1.        Provide a working link to your CV

        2.        Use “Technical” as the
 subject line

        3.        Include a short cover letter in your application





About the Role

We are seeking a Technical Specialist to become part of our growing team. This position is well-suited for individuals who enjoy assisting customers, addressing basic technical issues, and expanding their knowledge of new tools and systems. Your main responsibility will be to handle customer inquiries, guide users through troubleshooting steps, and ensure that every concern is addressed clearly and accurately. We are looking for someone professional, detail-oriented, and motivated to grow.



You are not required to be an expert, but a strong willingness to learn and continuously improve is essential.



What You’ll Do

• Respond promptly and professionally to customer inquiries

• Help users resolve platform-related concerns

• Create, manage, and follow up on support tickets (such as Jira), escalating when necessary

• Take time to fully understand each issue before recommending solutions

• Collaborate with internal teams to make sure problems are completely resolved



What We’re Looking For

• Strong English communication skills, both written and spoken

• Previous customer service experience is beneficial but not required

• Experience using CRM platforms is an advantage

• Willingness to thoroughly learn our system and processes

• Organized and attentive to details

• Comfortable in a fast-paced work environment

• Self-motivated and proactive

• Able to troubleshoot basic issues independently



Work Setup

• 100% remote position

• 8 hours per shift

• 5 working days per week (may require 6 days when business needs demand it)
