title: Paid Media Specialist (B2B)
description:
We are seeking a strategic and results-driven Paid Media Specialist (B2B) to lead and scale our paid acquisition and demand generation efforts. This role is responsible for driving qualified leads, pipeline growth, and revenue through data-backed performance marketing strategies.



The ideal candidate is highly fluent in Google Ads and Meta 
 & Instagram) advertising, with a strong understanding of B2B funnels, attribution, and lifecycle marketing. TikTok experience is a plus. This role sits under the Marketing Department and works closely with Sales, Content, Creative, and CRO teams to ensure consistent, scalable growth.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design, execute, and optimize B2B performance marketing campaigns across Google Ads and Meta to drive leads, MQLs, SQLs, and pipeline growth.

- Own full-funnel strategy from awareness to conversion, managing budgets, bidding, targeting, and channel mix to maximize ROI.

- Analyze campaign performance using GA4, ad platform data, CRM insights, and dashboards to guide decisions and forecasting.

- Continuously test and optimize creatives, audiences, offers, and landing pages, partnering with CRO to improve conversion rates.

- Collaborate with creative and content teams to develop high-performing ad copy and creatives aligned with ICPs and buyer stages.

- Lead and mentor media buyers and performance marketers, supporting recruitment, onboarding, training, and skill development.

- Build scalable workflows, SOPs, and documentation to streamline paid acquisition and lead generation processes.

- Ensure alignment and collaboration across Sales, RevOps, and Marketing teams

- Stay current on performance marketing trends, platform updates, and emerging channels, maintaining certifications and exploring new opportunities.



Qualifications:

- 3+ years in performance marketing with a strong B2B lead generation focus

- Deep expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads (TikTok is a plus)

- Proven experience managing full-funnel B2B campaigns tied to pipeline and revenue

- Strong understanding of CRO, landing page optimization, and A/B testing

- Experience working with CRM systems and marketing attribution

- Proven leadership experience managing and developing teams

- Data-driven mindset with strong analytical and optimization skills

- Excellent communication, organization, and stakeholder management skills



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Want to work on projects that truly move the business forward? If this role feels like your next challenge, apply today and become part of a team that values your expertise.



Reach out anytime at 
 for questions or follow-ups.

title: Operations & Workforce Manager (Remote)
description:
Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Must be willing to work U.S. business hours.



???? About the Role



We are a growing U.S.-based company with a fully remote international team. As we scale, we are looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations & Workforce Manager to help translate leadership vision into structured execution.



This role is responsible for turning company goals into clear action plans, assigning tasks to tea
mbers, setting timelines, and ensuring projects move forward on schedule.



You will work directly with the founder and serve as the central point of accountability for team execution.



This is not an assistant role — this is a leadership execution role.



???? Key Responsibilities

1?? Project & Task Management



Break down company goals into actionable tasks



Assign responsibilities to appropriate tea
mbers



Develop timelines and project plans



Track progress across multiple initiatives



Identify bottlenecks and solve execution issues



2?? Team Accountability & Follow-Up



Run daily or bi-daily stand-up meetings



Conduct regular check-ins with tea
mbers



Ensure deadlines are met



Follow up consistently until tasks are completed



Escalate issues proactively



3?? Operations & Systems Development



Build and improve internal processes



Create SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)



Implement workflow systems (ClickUp, Asana, Monday, etc.)



Organize cross-department communication



Improve overall operational efficiency



4?? Reporting & Communication



Provide weekly progress reports to leadership



Maintain dashboards for project visibility



Communicate clearly across multiple time zones



Ensure alignment between departments



???? Who You Are



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Strong at holding others accountable



Comfortable managing remote teams



Proactive problem solver



Strong communicator (written & verbal English)



Experienced working U.S. business hours



Process-driven and systems-minded



Calm under pressure and deadline-focused



???? Required Experience



3+ years in Operations, Project Management, or Team Management



Experience managing remote teams



Experience working with U.S.-based companies (preferred)



Familiarity with project management software



Strong documentation and reporting skills



???? Success in This Role Looks Like:



Projects consistently completed on time



Fewer bottlenecks and missed deadlines



Clear visibility into team workload



Improved communication across departments



Founder spending less time following up on tasks



???? Compensation



Full-time (40 hours/week)



Salary-based position



Competitive compensation based on experience



Must be willing to work U.S. business hours



???? Why This Role Matters



This position plays a critical role in the company’s growth. You will be responsible for ensuring execution happens efficiently and consistently across the organization.



You will work closely with leadership and have the opportunity to grow into a senior operations role as the company scales.



NOTE: Kindly include a short voice recording or video introduction with your application. Applications submitted without this requirement will not be reviewed.

title: Product Manager (Early-Stage Digital Platform)
description:
Company:  BriarBear

Location:  Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule:  Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type:  Full-time



About this Role



We are building a new digital platform that is already in active development and preparing for

launch. We are looking for a Product Manager to help take the product from “working” to

excellent—with a strong focus on usability, clarity, quality, and early user adoption.

This role will work closely under a senior Product Manager and alongside a small, focused team

to refine features, improve user flows, ensure high product quality, and support launch

readiness.



While this position is posted as Product Manager, it is best described as a Product Specialist /

Associate Product Manager role. You will be deeply hands-on with the product and involved in

day-to-day execution, testing, iteration, and operational support.

This is an ideal role for someone who wants to own a real product, learn how early-stage

platforms are shaped, and contribute directly to something that will be used by real customers.



What You’ll Be Working On



- A web-based platform with:

- User accounts and profiles

- Core workflows that must be simple and intuitive

- A clear value proposition for multiple user types

- A product that must be:

- Easy to understand on first use

- Reliable and polished at launch

- Ready to support marketing and growth efforts



You will help ensure the product is something people actually want to sign up for and use.



Key Responsibilities



1. Product Research & Insight Gathering



- Research comparable platforms and products in related spaces

- Identify:

- Common feature patterns

- Best practices

- Gaps and opportunities

- Share concise insights and recommendations with the Product Manager and team



2.  Product Definition & Feature Support



- Assist in defining and refining:

- Core features

- MVP scope

- User flows and edge cases

- Help translate ideas into:

- Clear requirements

- Actionable tasks for development

- Keep the team aligned on priorities and next steps



3.  QA & Product Quality Ownership



- Thoroughly test features as they are built

- Identify bugs, UX issues, and unclear flows

- Ensure:

- Key user actions work smoothly

- The product feels professional and trustworthy

- Act as the primary QA owner before features are released



4.  Generalist Product & Operations Support



Because this is a small, early-stage team, you will also:

- Help respond to user questions or issues via

- Assist with basic customer support and troubleshooting

- Support operational tasks related to the platform

- Provide feedback on marketing assets, onboarding flows, and landing pages as

needed





This is a hands-on role where flexibility and ownership matter.





5.  Cross-Functional Collaboration



- Work daily with:

- A Product Manager

- A Developer

- A Marketing teammate

- Ensure the product supports marketing and growth initiatives

- Provide feedback and insights that improve conversion and user experience



Who This Role is For



- A strong generalist who enjoys switching between research, testing, and execution

- Someone detail-oriented who cares deeply about product quality

- A problem-solver who doesn’t need rigid structure to be effective

- Someone comfortable working closely with a small team and leadership



Required Skills & Experience



- Strong written and spoken English

- Ability to clearly document and explain product issues and ideas

- Comfort working with developers and testing live products

- High attention to detail and organization

- Willingness to handle customer-facing and operational tasks

- Ability to work graveyard shift aligned with US-based teams



Nice to Have (But Not Required)

- Experience with early-stage products or startups

- Familiarity with product tools (Notion, Figma, Jira, Linear, etc.)

- Experience supporting or QA-ing web platforms

- Interest in digital platforms, marketplaces, or SaaS products



Why This Role Matters



This product is approaching launch, and the decisions made now will directly affect:

- User trust

- Signup rates

- Early growth and retention



You’ll be close to the product every day and will play a meaningful role in shaping how it

performs in the real world.



Internal Note on Title

- External Title: Product Manager

- Internal Role: Product Specialist / Associate Product Manager 



Apply thru this form -

title: YouTube Video Editor
description:
Vending Accelerator™ is not a vending machine brand.



We are the category creator of High-Traffic Location Mastery™ — a system that helps professionals build six-figure vending businesses using 2–3 high-traffic locations instead of 30+ machines



We are growing quickly.



We publish:

* 1 long-form YouTube video per week

* Multiple YouTube Shorts weekly

* Instagram +
 Reels

* We are looking for a high-speed, high-standard video editor who can help us scale without sacrificing quality.



This is not an influencer channel.



This is a category-defining brand built on:

* Proof

* Precision

* Authority

* Real client results

* Psychology-driven positioning



We do not use hype edits.



We do not use flashy gimmicks.



We do not overproduce.



Our style is:

* Clean

* Sharp

* Intentional

* Strategic

* Conversion-aware



If you specialize in loud thumbnails, 
 edits, or dopamine-heavy cuts — this is not the role.



If you understand pacing, tension, authority, and clarity — keep reading.



* Editing 1 long-form YouTube video per week (10–25 minutes)

* Turning that long-form into 5–10 Shorts

* Delivering vertical versions formatted for IG + FB

* Clean captioning (no clutter)

* Strategic pacing to improve retention

* Simple but strong hook emphasis in first 5–10 seconds

* Quick turnaround (24-48 hours preferred for long-form)



You must:

* Understand retention editing

* Know how to cut dead space without killing authority

* Add subtle motion, zooms, framing adjustments

* Keep energy high without being obnoxious

* Deliver on time, every time

* Be responsive and coachable

* Think strategically, not just technically

* Speed with accuracy

* Clean file organization

* Ownership mentality

* Long-term partnership mindset

* Ability to take feedback without ego

* Experience editing education or business content

* Understanding of YouTube analytics

* Thumbnail collaboration ability

* Ability to suggest hook improvements



Ryan is the founder of Vending Accelerator™ and FREE Healthy Vending™ — a dual ecosystem serving 250,000+ students and tens of thousands of consumers nationwide.



His clients have generated over $20M+ in revenue across 2024–2025.



We are not experimenting.



We are scaling a proven system.



Send:

* Portfolio (long-form + shorts)

* 2 examples of business/education content

* Your turnaround time for: 15-minute YouTube video & 5 shorts from that video

* Your availability

* Your rate structure



We are hiring quickly.

title: Full-Time Funnel Expert
description:
About Us

We are a global tech company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time in history since the invention of banking, customers – not banks – can have full ownership of their money.

. Thanks to our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized technology, companies can work internationally with no risk of payment delays, and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banks.

. Workers can remit funds to their loved ones at almost no cost.

. And two billion unbanked can become financially independent.

We are not just building the future of finance. We can make a real difference.

We have validated the vision and secured the capital from both recurring revenues and a seed round. Now, we are leveling up our leadership.



Why Your Role Matters

As our Funnel Expert, you are the engine behind turning interest into action. You will work directly with one of the top funnel experts in the region, one of our founders, who has successfully created funnels generating billions of dollars in sales. Your support is essential to maximize his time and execute his strategies (and boost your personal knowledge in the process).



Unique Benefit

You will work directly with one of the founders, one of the top funnel experts in the region, who has generated billions of dollars in sales and has made multiple exits. This level of mentorship and exposure is rare and a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.



Key Responsibilities

- Design and optimize end-to-end user funnels — from awareness to conversion and retention.

- Conduct deep funnel analysis using quantitative and qualitative data.

- Run experiments to improve conversion rates and remove friction points.

- Implement and refine tracking, analytics, and instrumentation for funnel metrics.

- Collaborate with Growth, Product, Marketing, and Data teams to align funnel strategies.

- Identify bottlenecks and recommend data-backed improvements.

- Continuously measure and report on funnel performance and outcomes.



Skills & Experience

- Proven experience optimizing user funnels in digital products.

- Strong analytical skills and hands-on experience with data and analytics tools (Mixpanel, GA4, Amplitude, etc.)

- Track record of driving measurable improvements in conversion and engagement.

- Comfortable collaborating with cross-functional teams.

- Practical, execution-focused mindset and love for experimenting.



Salary:

 $1,000-$1,500 per month



To Apply:

Please reply to this job ad with "Funnel Expert_[Full Name]"



*Only applicants who follow these instructions will receive a screening form to complete.

title: Collection Contractor
description:
About the Job 

As a Collections Representative at PRS, the primary responsibility is to manage the collection process by monitoring delinquent accounts, negotiating payment arrangements, and ensuring compliance with policies. This role processes all collections notices and assists members with collection issues, offering guidance on repayment options while maintaining positive member relationships with strong communication, attention to detail, and problem-solving skills. 

 

This is full-time, Monday-Friday 8:00AM CST – 8:00PM CST (hours that collections can be operated, not mandatory 12 hour days) 



 

Pay - The salary range for this role is $3.50-$5.00 per hour based on experience. With potential of increases for performance.

 



Job Duties and Responsibilities 

- Receive incoming and make outbound calls to customers in arrears to discuss payment options to always comply with regulatory and Company policies 

- Advise and influence customers on the payment options for debt recovery handle each call promptly and in the correct manner, updating records accordingly customer related data accurately and efficiently 

- Manage customers who are resistant to agent contact by remaining polite, tactful, honest, and firm 

- Managing automated calls and
s 

- Handle difficult customers and escalated calls 

- Maintain accurate notes in customer accounts 

- Provide assistance with online payments 

- Provide customers recap of accounts for billing disputes 

- Reporting results to management and escalating problem accounts 

- Achieve set revenue targets and call objectives 

- Follow strict Company policies and procedures at all times, ensuring that all requirements are met

title: QBO Bookkeeper / AR-AP CoordinWe need a detail-obsessed bookkeepator (Projects, Invoicing, Payments, Emails) – Permanent
description:
We need a detail-obsessed bookkeeper to keep our project invoicing and payments clean in QuickBooks Online. The workload is about 10 hours/week, but it’s critical work that must be done accurately and consistently, so a minimum guarantee will be paid until workload grows to full-time hours.



COMPENSATION / HOURS (RETTAINER)

* Current workload is about 10 hours / week

* This role starts on a monthly retainer with a minimum guarantee of 60 hours/month (about 15 hours/week).

* Any hours beyond the monthly minimum are paid hourly.

* As workload grows, this role will expand to full-time role



WHAT YOU’LL DO

* Monitor and reply to finance-related
s from customers, suppliers, and internal team

* Communicate with our team in Slack

* In QuickBooks Online (QBO):

  * Create Projects under Customers using our next project number sequence

  * Convert Estimates into Project Estimates and ensure costs are entered next to each product

  * Create Invoices from Project Estimates

  * Record customer payments and correctly apply them to invoices/projects

* Accounts Payable:

  * Enter bills after matching them to POs

  * Pay bills in PayEdge and record bill payments in QBO

* Contractors:

  * Review contractor invoices vs Time Doctor hours for accuracy

  * Pay contractors and suppliers on schedule

* Accounts Receivable:

  * Collect payments from customers and ensure accurate tracking to the correct invoices/projects

* Keep tasks organized in Asana when needed



TOOLS

QuickBooks Online (QBO), RBC PayEdge, Time Doctor, Slack, Asana, Excel/Google Sheets



WHAT “GOOD” LOOKS LIKE

* No unapplied payments, duplicate entries, or sloppy project coding

* Bills must match POs before payment

* Clear audit trail: anyone can open a project and understand what happened

* Fast follow-through on payment collection and posting



REQUIREMENTS

* Proven QBO experience

* Strong AP discipline (PO matching + bill payment recording)

* Strong written English and clear communication

* High attention to detail (you catch mismatched totals and missing steps)

* Having ecommere experience is an asset, but not necessary



SCHEDULE

* Remote

* Permanent role

* Must overlap at least 3 hours with 9am–5pm Eastern Time



In your intro message, include your:

* expected hourly rate and years experience in QBO.

* availability in EST hours

* resume

title: Sales Team Lead
description:
Join our remote team!



We are a boutique customer experience BPO based in Charleston, South Carolina, with over a decade of delivering exceptional omnichannel support to 100+ valued clients and partners in the e-commerce space.



What You’ll Be Doing

As a Sales Team Lead, you’re not just managing a team, you’re leading a culture of excellence. You’ll coach, mentor, and motivate a high-performing team while monitoring KPIs and driving results. Expect a balance of hands-on performance management and strategic leadership.



Your Core Responsibilities:

- Drive Sales Results: Monitor team performance, optimize sales scripts, track KPIs, and ensure teams consistently meet or exceed targets.

- Coach & Develop Talent: Deliver structured, ongoing coaching sessions that motivate, challenge, and support tea
mbers in hitting performance and learning goals.

- Monitor & Improve: Spend up to 70% of your time on calls — live listening, QA monitoring, and ensuring SOP compliance across multiple campaigns.

- Lead by Example: You are the professional standard-setter, modeling best-in-class behavior and communication for your team, clients, and coworkers.

- Foster Client Partnerships: Host weekly/biweekly update calls with clients to share performance metrics, highlight wins, and surface areas for growth.

- Build Systems for Success: Create SOPs, sales scripts, and coaching materials. Bring fresh ideas, test proof of concept, and refine our customer journey and sales process.



What You’ll Bring to the Table:

- Proven Sales Experience: 2+ years in sales or telesales with a record of crushing targets.

- Call Center or BPO Leadership: Experience leading remote teams in a performance-driven environment — ideally within a BPO or contact center.

- Excellent Communication Skills: C1 English proficiency, both verbal and written, with minimal to no accent.

- Tech-Ready Setup:

Windows 10+ laptop/desktop, i5 processor (or better), 16GB+ RAM.

Noise-canceling headset with a clear mic.

Stable, wired internet connection (40 Mbps down / 20 Mbps up minimum).

- Professional Work Environment: A quiet, distraction-free remote setup — wherever in the world you call home.



Your Key Competencies and Attributes:

- Strong Interpersonal and Leadership Skills

Builds trust and rapport with clients and tea
mbers alike. Able to coach individuals for improved current performance and long-term growth.

- Proactive and Solution-Oriented

Takes initiative without being prompted. Identifies challenges early and brings fresh, creative approaches to solve problems and remove team bottlenecks.

- Detail-Oriented and Efficient

Balances a sharp eye for detail with the ability to deliver high-quality work efficiently and without wasted effort.

- Performance-Driven with a Growth Mindset

Demonstrates strong work ethic and tenacity, pushing through challenges with a “never say die” attitude. Committed to personal and team excellence.

- Calm and Adaptable Under Pressure

Thrives in fast-paced, high-stress environments. Adjusts seamlessly to shifting priorities and conditions while maintaining stability and focus.

- Analytical and Tech-Savvy

Comfortable with CRMs, digital tools, and performance dashboards. Proficient in Excel or Google Sheets for building tracking tools and extracting insights.

- Quick Learner with Intellectual Agility

Absorbs new information rapidly and applies it effectively across different contexts.

- Multitasker with Strong Prioritization Skills

Capable of managing multiple projects and deadlines while keeping the most critical initiatives on track.

- Positive and Energetic Team Player

Brings enthusiasm and a can-do attitude to the workplace. Approachable, affable, and genuinely excited to contribute to team success.



What’s In It For You?



100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines

Career Growth – Opportunities to scale into higher leadership roles

Competitive Pay – $7/hr + benefits as an independent contractor

Supportive Culture – Work alongside a team that values transparency and innovation

People-First Vibes – We believe in fun, flexibility, and thriving together

Annual Performance Reviews – Your growth is recognized and rewarded



Ready to Coach from Anywhere?

If you're passionate about developing others, building resilient remote teams, and leading with data, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Procurement Assistant
description:
Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Procurement Assistant to join our team. The primary responsibility of this role is to assist in preparing and submitting proposals for government contracts. Additionally, this role includes content creation duties to support social media and
 marketing efforts.



About BNX Business Advisors:



BNX Business Advisors is a U.S.-based consulting firm that helps organizations operate more effectively by aligning people, leadership, and performance with clear business goals. We specialize in leadership development, workforce strategy, organizational assessments, and HR consulting for growing companies, public agencies, and institutions.



Our mission is to help organizations Elevate Today. Excel Tomorrow. by strengthening teams, deepening employee engagement, and protecting profitability through practical, results-driven solutions. With a proven track record of improving performance, building healthy workplace cultures, and ensuring HR compliance across industries, BNX serves as a trusted partner in long-term organizational success.



Working at BNX:



At BNX, we believe that great work starts with great people. We are a collaborative, team-oriented organization made up of caring professionals who genuinely believe in the impact of the work we do. Even as a remote team, we prioritize communication, support, and shared success.



We value individuals who are proactive, detail-oriented, and committed to excellence. Our environment encourages growth, accountability, and continuous learning, while also fostering respect, flexibility, and strong working relationships across borders. Find out more about at 



Our Core Values

Leadership • Integrity • Impact • Excellence • Equity • Innovation



Key Responsibilities:

Proposal Writing and Procurement Support:



Research and identify government contract opportunities.

Prepare, write, and submit comprehensive and compliant proposals in response to government RFPs, RFQs, and RFIs.

Maintain and update a repository of past proposals, templates, and compliance documents.

Collaborate with tea
mbers to gather necessary information and data for proposals.

Track deadlines and ensure timely submission of all proposals and supporting documents.

Liaise with the Procurement Coordinator to manage post-submission follow-ups and communications.

Qualifications:

Education: High School Diploma

Experience:

Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in proposal writing, grant writing, or government contracting.

Experience in content creation, digital marketing, or related fields is a plus.

Skills:

Exceptional writing and editing skills with attention to detail.

Strong research and analytical abilities.

Proficiency in MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and project management tools.

Knowledge of government procurement processes and regulations is a bonus.

Key Competencies:

Strategic Thinking

Taking ownership over your role and initiatives

Excellent organizational and time management skills.

Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously.

Creative problem-solving and adaptability.

Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Proactive and self-motivated with a collaborative mindset.

title: Sales Rep
description:
We are looking for a motivated appointment setter to help us connect with bar owners, nightclubs, and other nightlife venues.

In this role, you will be provided with a targeted list of businesses. Your responsibility is to reach out, build initial interest, and schedule meetings for our team with the decision-makers.



Compensation:

$300 per location that closes (our close rate is ~40% due to the strong value we provide)

$2/hour base pay

High earning potential — setters can easily book 10+ appointments per week



What You’ll Do:

Contact bars, nightclubs, and similar venues from our provided list

Speak with owners or decision-makers

Set qualified appointments for our team

Maintain consistent outreach and follow-up



What We’re Looking For:

Strong communication skills

Confidence speaking with business owners

Self-motivated and consistent work ethic



This role has significant upside for the right person. We are hiring with long-term growth in mind, and there will be opportunities for increased pay and responsibility based on performance.

title: Online Freelance Business English Teacher
description:
WHO ARE WE?



Cercle des Langues (
) is an EdTech company founded in 2019 by pedagogy enthusiasts with a simple mission: helping students gain confidence in English. Our teaching method is built on four pillars: e-learning modules, individual lessons, group classes, and webinars.

Our core values are exactitude, performance and team spirit. We also advocate for engaging and fun learning methods.

To drive our expansion, we are looking for online freelance teachers to teach private and group classes to our students



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR ?

A freelance teacher with all legal requirements to be able to invoice

A dynamic teacher who is passionate about pedagogy.

Experience: Proven experience in online teaching, specifically with adults and French speakers.

Specialization: Experience in or a strong interest in Business English

Tech-savvy: Comfortable with new technologies or a strong willingness to learn.

Certification: A teaching qualification (TEFL, CELTA, or equivalent) is required.

Personal Qualities: Curiosity and a daily thirst for both learning and teaching. Autonomy and a drive to constantly improve teaching methods. Thoughtful, structured, and organized approach. Eagerness to participate in an innovative project. A team player with a contagious positive attitude.



RECRUITMENT PROCESS

Step 0 : Send us your CV and a cover letter / why you are interested in joining Cercle des Langues

Step 1 : Video Introduction: We will send you a video presenting Cercle des Langues. In return, you will send us a video of yourself introducing who you are and sharing your motivations.

Step 2 : A meeting with the Pedagogy team to discuss your teaching experience in detail and get to know you.

Step 3 : Technical Assessment, to test your pedagogical skills through a practical case study or mock lesson.

title: Strategic Development Lead (SDL) Vantage Group Remote / Virtual | Full-Time Business Development, Outbound Sales
description:
Strategic Development Lead (SDL)

Vantage Group

Remote / Virtual | Full-Time

Business Development, Outbound Sales, Pipeline Ownership



About Vantage Group

Vantage Group is a facilities management and execution platform built to bring clarity, accountability, and operational control to interior and exterior services across complex property portfolios.

We work with owners, operators, and property groups who are tired of:

- Managing fragmented vendor networks

- Chasing missed services and incomplete work

- Lacking visibility, documentation, and enforcement

- Vantage is not a property management company.

- We are the operating and accountability layer between ownership and execution.

- We are building this company with systems, structure, and long-term enterprise value in mind.



Role Summary

The Strategic Development Lead (SDL) owns the front end of revenue creation at Vantage Group.

This role is responsible for:

- Proactively identifying ideal clients

- Initiating and leading outbound conversations

- Qualifying prospects with discipline

- Advancing only the right opportunities into discovery

- This is not a meeting-setter role.

- This is not a support role.

- You are expected to build and manage your own book of business, exercise judgment, and protect the company’s time by disqualifying poor-fit opportunities early.



Mission of the Role

The SDL exists to answer one question every day:

- “Are we putting the company in front of the right buyers, at the right time, with the right expectations?”

Your success is measured by pipeline quality, not activity volume.



Core Responsibilities

1. Outbound Strategy & Prospecting

- Identify and refine Ideal Client Profiles (ICPs) in collaboration with leadership

- Build targeted outbound prospect lists by:

- Market

- Asset type

- Portfolio size

- Ownership and management structure

- Research decision-makers (Director, VP, Owner, Head of Operations, etc.)

- Execute outbound campaigns via approved channels:

-

- LinkedIn

- Other outbound tools as directed

- You are expected to understand who you are reaching out to and why, not blast generic messages.



2. Outreach Execution & Messaging

Personalize outreach based on:

- Portfolio complexity

- Service exposure

- Known pain points

- Communicate Vantage’s value proposition clearly and professionally

- Handle early objections with confidence and clarity

- Maintain consistent follow-up without being pushy or transactional

- Your communication should feel consultative and credible, not salesy.



3. Qualification & Deal Shaping

You are responsible for qualifying prospects against Vantage’s operating model.

You must confirm:

- Decision-making authority

- Portfolio size and geographic spread

- Services required (interior, exterior, emergency)

- Current vendor structure and failure points

- Willingness to allow enforcement and accountability



You are expected to disqualify:

- Procurement-only buyers

- Price-only shoppers

- One-off service seekers

- Prospects unwilling to align with our model

- Protecting the company’s time is part of your job.



4. Opportunity Advancement

Advance qualified prospects into structured discovery

Ensure discovery handoffs are clean, accurate, and complete



Provide internal teams with:

- Clear context

- Accurate expectations

- Properly qualified opportunities

- The quality of your handoff directly affects close rates and execution success.



5. CRM, Process & Data Discipline

- Maintain accurate CRM records at all times

- Log outreach activity, conversations, and deal stages

- Follow defined sales processes and timelines

- Keep pipeline data clean and current

- If it’s not documented, it doesn’t exist.



6. Market Intelligence & Feedback Loop

Surface patterns in:

- Buyer objections

- Pricing resistance

- Market demand

- Competitive positioning

- Provide regular feedback to leadership

- Help refine ICPs, messaging, and targeting strategy

- This role is expected to contribute strategically, not just execute tasks.



What This Role Is Not

- Not a call-center position

- Not a script-only SDR role

- Not a task-based VA position

- Not a passive “set meetings and move on” role

- This role requires judgment, ownership, and professionalism.



Required Experience & Skills

You should have:

- 3–7+ years of B2B outbound sales, SDR, BDR, or business development experience

- Proven experience building outbound pipelines from scratch

- Comfort speaking with senior decision-makers

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Ability to qualify, disqualify, and prioritize effectively

- High personal accountability and discipline

- Experience in facilities management, property services, construction, or operational B2B services is a strong advantage but not required.



Performance Expectations

You will be evaluated on:

- Number of qualified opportunities created

- Quality of opportunities (fit, authority, scope)

- Conversion from first contact ? discovery

- Monthly pipeline value created

- CRM accuracy and adherence to process

- Activity without outcomes is not considered success.



Compensation & Growth

- This role is performance-aligned.

- Competitive base compensation (based on experience and location)

- Performance-based incentives tied to qualified pipeline and closed revenue

- Clear growth path as Vantage scales

- Details will be discussed with qualified candidates.



Why This Role Matters

Vantage Group is being built as a long-term platform, not a short-term sales operation.

As an SDL, you will:

- Play a direct role in shaping growth

- Work within a clear, disciplined system

- Be evaluated objectively

- Grow alongside a serious operating team

- This role matters because who we sell to determines how well we can execute.



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume

A brief 3-5 minute loom video response explaining:

- Your experience with outbound sales

- The types of buyers you’ve sold to

- Why this role aligns with your goals

- Candidates who demonstrate clarity, professionalism, and ownership will be prioritized

- What is something that you like doing outside of work



Final Note

- If you are looking for:

- Low accountability

- Script-only outreach

- A purely administrative role

- This is not the position for you.

- If you are looking to:

- Build real pipeline

- Influence company growth

- Be trusted with responsibility

- Be judged on results

- We welcome your application.

title: Supply Chain Director
description:
Ikigai Cases is hiring for a Director of Supply Chain

Location: Remote

Compensation: $3500 per month + performance-based bonuses



About the Company

Ikigai Cases (
) is a fast-growing ecommerce brand manufacturing aerospace-grade aluminum pill cases. Founded in December 2021 by two brothers after their father's neurological diagnosis led them to discovering the issues with plastic pill organizers, we've built a multi-million dollar business in just over four years with a team of 25 across the globe. 



Our mission is simple: make exceptional pill cases and provide exceptional customer service. We deliver on this by managing in-house fulfillment at our Washington, DC facility (including custom engraving) and maintaining obsessive attention to detail.



About the Role

We are hiring a Director of Supply Chain to take complete ownership of our supply chain function — strategy, execution, team development, and results. If you've scaled ecommerce/DTC supply chains before and want full autonomy to run a supply chain like your own business unit, this is the role.



You'll inherit a solid operational foundation including a capable team of two (Supply Chain Manager and Demand Planner), and your mandate is to turn supply chain operations at Ikigai Cases into a well-oiled machine. We expect you to come into the company and systematically reduce costs, build scalable systems, and eliminate fires before they reach leadership.

This is a role where you're expected to bring your own vision, not execute someone else's — you'll diagnose what needs to happen, build the roadmap, and drive measurable improvements every quarter without needing direction.



5 Core Responsibilities

Supply Chain Strategy & Execution Ownership: Own the supply chain function end-to-end with complete strategic and operational accountability. Build the roadmap from current state to future scale, execute autonomously, and deliver quarterly results without needing direction or validation.



Proactive Problem Resolution & Crisis Management: Eliminate supply chain fires before they reach leadership—vendor delays, tariff chaos, customs nightmares, stockout risks. Handle all escalations decisively through strong vendor relationships, creative problem-solving, and systems that prevent recurring issues.



Cost Optimization & Continuous Improvement: Systematically drive down landed costs, optimize vendor terms, and improve operational efficiency quarter over quarter. Deliver measurable cost reductions and margin improvements through strategic sourcing, freight optimization, tariff mitigation strategies, and process excellence.



Supply Chain System Builder: Design and implement world-class demand planning, inventory management, vendor partnerships, and operational processes that scale seamlessly through aggressive growth. Build the infrastructure that turns chaotic firefighting into predictable, bulletproof operations.



Team Leadership & Development: Manage and significantly elevate our Supply Chain Manager and Demand Planner through coaching, systems, and clear accountability. Take full ownership of their performance and growth, scale the team strategically as needed, hire A-players, and maintain consistently high standards across all supply chain operations.



Why You Should Take This Role

-You’ll be working at a brand that is obsessed with their customers and has built a loyal following. Just read a few of their reviews: 

-You'll be working at a company that has scaled rapidly in just 4 years and is aggressively investing in growth. Our goal is to make the best pill cases in the world.

-You’ll be working with people who have extreme levels of competitive fire in their bellies - people who will run through walls to make sure the company succeeds.

-You'll work hand-in-hand with the founder, not through layers of management, with full autonomy to own your domain.

-You’ll be working to make people’s lives easier with products they’ll use every single day. The company was founded to solve a personal problem Tavish’s father had with his pill organizers while battling a neurological condition for a decade. 

-You’ll be working on a complex, truly unique supply chain - aerospace-grade aluminum manufacturing, in-house engraving, international freight, tariff strategy, high-velocity product releases. 



Required Experience & Skills Experience

-7+ years of total supply chain experience in DTC/ecommerce brands

-3+ years as a Director of Supply Chain (or equivalent leadership role with full functional ownership)

-Hard goods manufacturing experience (metal, durability products, consumer goods - NOT apparel/soft goods only)

-International manufacturing management (Asia-US supply chains)

-Proven measurable cost reduction achievements

-Has managed supply chain teams (3+ people)

-Has navigated major supply chain crises (tariffs, COVID, vendor failures)

-Must be based outside the United States.



Nice-to-Have Experience

-CNC Machining / Aerospace-Grade Aluminum / Anodizing supply chain experience

-Experience with in-house fulfillment operations (not just outsourced 3PL)

-EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) familiarity

-High-velocity product launch experience (monthly or faster launch cadence)

-Multi-country sourcing experience (supplier diversification strategies)

-Multi-channel fulfillment experience (DTC, Amazon, wholesale/retail)



Compensation Details

-Compensation: $3500 per month + performance-based bonuses

-Work Hours: 50 hours per week, flexible scheduling to meet needs of the role

-Paid Holidays: 10 paid holidays per year

-PTO: 1 week earned for every 6 months worked at the company

-Location: Remote / Work From Home



To Apply

Fill out the application form here: 



This application includes a number of questions in order to ensure we hire an outstanding candidate for this position, so please be advised in advance that it will take time to complete.

title: Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
Ikigai Cases is hiring for a Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist

Location: Remote

Compensation: $1800 per month + performance-based bonuses



About the Company

Ikigai Cases is a family-owned e-commerce business selling premiu
tal pill cases. The business was founded in 2021 in Washington DC by two brothers. After four years, the company has grown to selling thousands of pill cases every month and double-digit tea
mbers, including a thriving remote team.



Our mission is simple: to make exceptional pill cases and provide exceptional customer service. We uphold this commitment by managing our fulfillment operations in-house and offering white-glove service to our customers.



What We’re Looking For

We’re hiring a Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist who is a true hunter—someone exceptional at cold sourcing senior talent and uncovering high-caliber Manager, Director, and Executive candidates from the market. You’ll work hand-in-hand with the Recruiting Manager and the CEO, executing tightly defined searches based on clear job descriptions and ICPs, then independently sourcing, qualifying, and delivering top-tier candidates. This is not a generalist recruiting or HR role. We’re looking for a self-sufficient candidate sourcing professional who can design search strategies, find talent others miss, and consistently surface candidates worth executive time with minimal direction.



About You

-You should be self-motivated and looking to work hard - as you will be expected to work hard, contribute and execute without supervision to help the whole team.

-You are highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to juggle multiple priorities without sacrificing quality.

-You take pride in your work and are proactive, anticipating the needs of the company and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations.



5 Core Responsibilities

1. EXECUTIVE-LEVEL COLD SOURCING: Independently identify and source high-caliber Manager, Director, and Executive candidates using LinkedIn, networks, and non-obvious channels—based on a clearly defined job description and ideal candidate profile.

2. SEARCH STRATEGY & MARKET INTELLIGENCE: Design and execute end-to-end sourcing strategies per role, including identifying where top candidates actually work, how they move roles, and which backgrounds consistently produce A-players.

3. OUTREACH & FIRST-CONTACT QUALIFICATION: Write high-signal cold outreach that converts strong candidates into conversations, then conduct initial screens to validate role fit, caliber, and motivation before handing off to the lead interviewer.

4. PIPELINE OWNERSHIP (SOURCING STAGE): Build and maintain a clean, organized top-of-funnel pipeline of sourced candidates—tracking outreach, responses, and qualified handoffs with speed and precision.

5. SCREENING INTERVIEWS: Run short, high-signal screening interviews for select Manager, Director, or Executive candidates when additional clarity is required—confirming scope, decision-making level, and trajectory before handing off candidates to leadership. 



Why You Should Take This Role

-You’ll be working at a brand that is obsessed with their customers and has built a loyal following. Just read a few of their reviews: 

-You’ll be working at a company that has scaled up extremely quickly - while focusing on the operational side of the business. Now that the operations are stabilized with key roles in place, we are focused on investing in growth.

-You’ll be working with people who have extreme levels of competitive fire in their bellies - people who will run through walls to make sure the company succeeds.

-You’ll be working hand-in-hand with the founders of the company - building the systems and growth strategy together.

-You’ll be working at a company with a robust product development roadmap that includes new colors / products releasing monthly



Required Experience & Skills Experience:

-Minimum of 3 years in talent acquisition, recruiting & headhunting roles, including experience searching for e-commerce talent specifically

-Proven ability to source great candidates, evaluate them, coordinate the interview process with the client, and close searches effectively and independently.

-Excellent English skills & an outgoing personality as you will be required to represent the brand to prospective candidates during screening interviews and in written messages to candidates



Communication & English Proficiency

-Excellent written and verbal English skills.

-Excellent energy & interview presence to engage candidates with the company.

-Ability to communicate effectively with internal teams and candidates over



Compensation Details

, and websites

s

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

title: Full Stack Developer (AI-Forward)
description:
Full Stack Developer (AI-Forward) 



We're building fast and we need a developer who can keep up. We're looking for a Full Stack Developer who owns the entire product lifecycle. Frontend to backend, database to deployment and is actively embracing AI as part of how they work and what they build. 



If you're the kind of developer who figures things out, ships real products, and gets excited when new AI tools drop, keep reading. 



What You'll Own 

    Full end-to-end development of web applications. UI, APIs, databases, and deployment 

    Architecture decisions across the full stack

    PostgreSQL & MongoDB — know when and how to use each 

    Prisma — experience as an ORM in real projects 

    Docker — containerization as a standard part of your workflow 

    GitHub — disciplined version control, branching, and collaboration practices 



Preferred Experience 

    LangChain / LangGraph — building agentic or multi-step AI workflows 

    Claude Code — or similar AI-assisted coding tools actively used in your process 

    N8N — real workflow automations, not just demos 



About You 

    You've built complete products and can show them

    You're already using AI tools in your daily development workflow 

    You move fast without cutting corners 



What to Include When You Apply

    GitHub profile or portfolio

Note: Candidates who cannot demonstrate projects they've personally built and explain the architecture will not move forward in the process. 



Why This Role 

You'll have real ownership, work on interesting problems, and be part of a team that values people who build, not just people who talk about building. 



This is a targeted search with an April 1 start date. We are actively interviewing now and will move quickly for the right candidate.

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
Vending Accelerator™ is not a vending machine brand.



We are the category creator of High-Traffic Location Mastery™ — a system that helps professionals build six-figure vending businesses using 2–3 high-traffic locations instead of 30+ machines



We are growing quickly.



We publish:

* 1 long-form YouTube video per week

* Multiple YouTube Shorts weekly

* Instagram +
 Reels

* We are looking for a high-speed, high-standard video editor who can help us scale without sacrificing quality.



This is not an influencer channel.



This is a category-defining brand built on:

* Proof

* Precision

* Authority

* Real client results

* Psychology-driven positioning



We do not use hype edits.



We do not use flashy gimmicks.



We do not overproduce.



Our style is:

* Clean

* Sharp

* Intentional

* Strategic

* Conversion-aware



If you specialize in loud thumbnails, 
 edits, or dopamine-heavy cuts — this is not the role.



If you understand pacing, tension, authority, and clarity — keep reading.



* Editing 1 long-form YouTube video per week (10–25 minutes)

* Turning that long-form into 5–10 Shorts

* Delivering vertical versions formatted for IG + FB

* Clean captioning (no clutter)

* Strategic pacing to improve retention

* Simple but strong hook emphasis in first 5–10 seconds

* Quick turnaround (24-48 hours preferred for long-form)



You must:

* Understand retention editing

* Know how to cut dead space without killing authority

* Add subtle motion, zooms, framing adjustments

* Keep energy high without being obnoxious

* Deliver on time, every time

* Be responsive and coachable

* Think strategically, not just technically

* Speed with accuracy

* Clean file organization

* Ownership mentality

* Long-term partnership mindset

* Ability to take feedback without ego

* Experience editing education or business content

* Understanding of YouTube analytics

* Thumbnail collaboration ability

* Ability to suggest hook improvements



Ryan is the founder of Vending Accelerator™ and FREE Healthy Vending™ — a dual ecosystem serving 250,000+ students and tens of thousands of consumers nationwide.



His clients have generated over $20M+ in revenue across 2024–2025.



We are not experimenting.



We are scaling a proven system.



Send:

* Portfolio (long-form + shorts)

* 2 examples of business/education content

* Your turnaround time for: 15-minute YouTube video & 5 shorts from that video

* Your availability

* Your rate structure



We are hiring quickly.

title: Accounts Payable & Receivable / Accounting VA for Gemstone Development & OWSI
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and dependable Accounting professional to join our growing team.

If you are a QuickBooks expert who thrives on organization, accuracy, and communication, this could be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



You’ll work daily with our in-house Bookkeeper and Accounting Manager through live video meetings, managing all Accounts Payable and Receivable responsibilities for two established Utah-based companies:

~ Gemstone Development – High-End Custom Home Builder & Real Estate Developer

~ Old World Stone Imports (OWSI) – Flooring, Tile, Countertop & Design Center



Both companies are financially strong and fast-paced. We’re looking for a professional who is dependable, confident, and motivated to take ownership of their work while maintaining precision and integrity in every transaction.



What You’ll Do (Main Responsibilities)



~ including but not limited to ~



Receive and accurately enter bills into QuickBooks and Fishbowl Inventory.

Manage vendor credits and ensure all refunds or adjustments are properly applied.

File and track claims for damaged or incorrect materials.

Reconcile vendor accounts and maintain up-to-date records.

Prepare, send, and track customer invoices and ensure timely collections.

File Preliminary Notices and Full Liens for construction projects when needed.

Receive and record customer payments daily.

Communicate with vendors and customers by phone, then text, then
.

Participate in daily video meetings for coordination and updates.

Maintain complete confidentiality and professionalism with all company financial information.



What We’re Looking For (Qualifications)



~ essential for success in this position ~



Strong background in Accounting (not just bookkeeping) with understanding of U.S. and Utah accounting practices and documentation standards.

Expert-level experience in QuickBooks — AP, AR, reconciliation, and reporting.

Experience using Fishbowl Inventory is highly preferred.

Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken, and confident on phone calls.

Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word.

Extremely detail-oriented, organized, and dependable.

Able to handle sensitive financial information with confidentiality and integrity.

Proactive, self-motivated, and reliable with strong follow-through.

Capable of working efficiently under deadlines in a structured environment.

Must use Hubstaff for time tracking during all work hours.

Stable internet connection and ability to join daily video calls.



Schedule & Work Requirements



Monday through Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Mountain Standard Time (Utah, USA)

Full-Time, 40 hours per week

100% Remote



Preferred Experience



Experience working with U.S.-based construction or design-related companies.

Familiarity with lien documentation, 1099 processing, and Utah accounting procedures.

Experience with reconciliation, journal entries, and month-end reporting.

Strong understanding of vendor management and project-based accounting.



About the Companies



Old World Stone Imports (OWSI) and Gemstone Development are long-standing, reputable Utah companies known for professionalism, quality, and reliability.

Both operate with strong vendor relationships, consistent financial performance, and a dedication to precision. Joining this tea
ans working in a results-driven environment where accuracy and accountability matter every day.



How to Apply



If you’re ready to bring your accounting expertise to a team that values precision, honesty, and consistency — we’d love to meet you.



Please include the following in your application:

~ A short video introduction sharing your accounting background and professional experience

~ A summary of your QuickBooks and Accounting history, including any U.S. or Utah-specific work

~ A sample or portfolio of accounting work such as reports, reconciliations, or spreadsheets

~ A short explanation of how you maintain accuracy, confidentiality, and data security in your work



When applying, please use the subject line:

“Accounting VA – I Am Ready to Keep Your Books Perfectly Balanced”



Applications without this subject line may not be reviewed.



Trust & Security Verification



This position involves handling sensitive financial data and requires a high level of integrity and accountability.

All applicants may need to complete a security verification process that includes identity verification, signing a Confidentiality & Integrity Agreement, reference checks, and limited access setup within accounting systems to ensure full protection for both the company and the employee.

title: Amazon Revenue Operator
description:
We are looking for an Amazon Revenue Operator who takes full ownership of performance.

This is not a support role.

You are responsible for:

* Revenue growth

* Preventing revenue loss

* Making the account run as a high-performance machine

If listings are offline, stock is unavailable, or ads are misaligned ??this results in lost revenue ? and this is your responsibility.

You do not wait for instructions.?You identify problems, act fast, and execute.

* Monitor and improve keyword ranking (act within 24h on drops)

* Scale winning SKUs and stop underperformers

* Manage Amazon cases and resolve issues fast

* Allocate budgets based on ROI across countries

* Manage agency as execution partner (you are in control)

* Identify and execute growth opportunities



What we expect:

* You think in revenue, not tasks

* You are proactive and decisive



KPIs:

We are looking for someone who owns the outcome.

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company creating high-converting video ads for DTC brands in supplements, footwear, and more. We're looking for an AI Video Editor who can produce incredibly realistic, AI-generated video ads that look indistinguishable from real footage.



What you'll do:

• Create 20-50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Produce AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll content using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta and Google to create high-converting ad variations

• Independently concept and produce creative video ad variations that drive sales

• Assist with scripting when needed (scripts typically provided)



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads specifically for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI video/image generation tools like Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a portfolio to prove it

• Ability to generate extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Creative eye for direct-response advertising and what makes ads convert

• Self-starter who can independently produce high-volume ad creatives



Nice to have:

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools



This is a part-time position working 32 hours per week with flexible scheduling Monday through Saturday. 



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AICreator492'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut.

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced).

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"?

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential?

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit?

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.

title: Operations & Marketing Coordinator
description:
# Virtual Assistant



Operations, Admin and Marketing Support (For BFT - Bodyfit Training )

Remote Role



We are a growing fitness studio based in Melbourne, Australia helping busy adults rebuild strength, consistency and confidence through elite coaching and a strong community.



As the business grows we are looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant who can support operations, marketing and member communication so the owner can focus on leadership, coaching and growing the business.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys systems, solving problems and supporting a growing business behind the scenes.



The role will primarily focus on **administration (around 80 percent of the work)** with approximately **20 percent supporting marketing and content creation**.



---



# Key Responsibilities



## Admin and Operations (Approx 80%)



Help keep the daily operations organized and running smoothly.



Responsibilities include



• Managing reports using Excel or Google Sheets

• Updating dashboards and performance trackers

• Maintaining organized folders and documentation

• Managing operational checklists and systems

• Preparing summaries and reports when needed

• Supporting requests from the studio manager



---



## CRM and Member Management



Supporting member administration and maintaining accurate data.



Responsibilities include



• Processing membership sales

• Processing refunds when required

• Managing membership pauses

• Updating member details in CRM systems

• Sending member communication through
 and text

• Maintaining accurate member records



---



## Lead Management and Sales Support



Helping ensure enquiries and conversations are handled quickly and professionally.



Responsibilities include



• Responding to leads and enquiries

• Sell by chat through social media and messaging platforms

• Tracking conversations and outcomes

• Supporting the sales process by keeping data organized



---



## Marketing and Content Creation (Approx 20%)



Helping us showcase our coaching, community and member results.



Responsibilities include



• Creating graphics and creatives for events

• Designing Instagram and
 content

• Editing short videos or reels from raw footage

• Scheduling and organizing social media posts

• Supporting the planning of marketing campaigns



---



## Meta Ads Management



Supporting digital marketing campaigns.



Responsibilities include



• Creating and managing Meta Ads campaigns

• Monitoring campaign performance

• Updating creatives and copy when required

• Reporting on lead performance



---



## Social Media and Inbox Management



Helping maintain communication across platforms.



Responsibilities include



• Managing Instagram and
 inboxes

• Responding to enquiries and directing leads

• Maintaining positive and professional communication

• Monitoring comments and messages



---



# Skills and Experience



We are looking for someone who is



• Highly organized and detail oriented

• Proactive and able to take initiative

• Comfortable working independently

• Strong with written English communication

• Reliable and consistent with deadlines



Bonus experience with



• Canva

• Excel or Google Sheets

• CRM systems

• Meta Ads Manager

• Social media management

• Go High Level (GHL)

• Glofox gym management software



---



# Working Hours



The Service Provider will work within the following schedule



Monday to Friday

8:00am to 5:00pm Australian time



This includes



• 8 hours of working time per day

• 1 hour unpaid lunch break



In addition, the Service Provider will complete



2 hours on Saturday between 12:00pm and 2:00pm Australian time



Saturday responsibilities include



• Admin tidy up

• Posting the Saturday reel

• Posting Instagram stories for the studio



If vacation leave or sick leave is required, the Client should be notified as early as possible so work can be reassigned if needed.



Holidays followed will depend on the demand of work and business requirements.



---



# Compensation



Monthly compensation



**600 AUD per month**



Payment will be made **fortnightly through Wise** to the service provider’s bank account.



A performance evaluation will occur after **60 days** to ensure the service provider can operate independently, take initiative and support the business effectively.



A **13th month bonus may be provided after one year of service**, depending on performance.



---



# Contract Terms



This role operates under an **independent contractor agreement**.



Key expectations include



• Maintaining strict confidentiality of business information

• Protecting member and customer data

• Not soliciting members or suppliers of the business

• All work, content and intellectual property created during the role remains the property of the company



Either party may terminate the agreement with **14 days written notice**.



---



# Confidentiality and Intellectual Property



The Service Provider agrees not to disclose or use any confidential information belonging to the Client, including but not limited to



• Customer lists

• Financial data

• Sales information

• Business strategies

• Marketing data

• Operational systems



This obligation remains in effect during and after the termination of the agreement.



All materials, work products, documents and intellectual property created while working with the business remain the property of the company.



---



# To Apply



Please include the following in your application



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your previous experience with admin, marketing or CRM systems

• Examples of Canva, design or social media work if available

• Your weekly availability



Please also answer the following question



If you started this role tomorrow, what are three things you would organize or improve first on the admin or marketing side of the business?



Please also include **your favourite fruit at the beginning of your application** and send a message with your fruit so we know you have read the full job description.

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Sales Account Executive
description:
How to Apply

* Send your most updated resume to 



About us:



Gushwork.ai builds AI Agents that help small and medium businesses automate their entire inbound marketing stack — from SEO and website content to reviews, blogs, and lead funnels. Our current focus is the manufacturing and industrial distributors industry.



In plain English: we’re replacing bloated marketing agencies with intelligent, always-on software.



Backed by Lightspeed, SIG, Beenext, and B Capital, Gushwork.ai is one of the fastest-growing AI companies globally.



In just a year, we’ve grown to $1.5M ARR and are scaling fast toward $15M ARR in the next 12 months — helping thousands of small businesses grow smarter, not harder.



The Role:



We’re looking for a closer who thrives in fast-paced, high-velocity sales environments. You’ll own the full sales cycle from discovery to close for qualified meetings booked by our 10-person BDR team. This is a quota-carrying role where you’ll close 4-8 deals monthly, with deal cycles ranging from 1-3 calls.



Working Hours: US Shift (9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST)

Work Mode: Remote



What You’ll Do:



- Run discovery calls with qualified prospects (OEMs, distributors, manufacturers) to uncover pain points around lead generation and digital presence

- Deliver compelling demos that connect our AI SEO solution to specific business outcomes and revenue impact

- Navigate buying committees within SMB organizations, typically engaging with Marketing Directors, Sales Leaders, and C-suite

- Close deals on 12-month contracts with ACV of $5k-$25k, meeting or exceeding monthly quota

- Manage pipeline with discipline—forecast accurately, maintain detailed CRM hygiene, and move deals forward with urgency

- Partner with Growth Managers post-sale to ensure smooth handoffs and identify expansion opportunities

- Iterate on sales methodology by sharing wins/losses and collaborating on improving conversion rates



What Success Looks Like:



- Month 1-2: Ramp on product, market, and sales process; close your first 2-3 deals

- Month 3+: Consistently hit/exceed quota of 4-8 closed deals monthly

- Ongoing: Maintain 30%+ demo-to-close conversion rate and sub-30 day sales cycles



You’re a Great Fit If You Have:



- 2-4 years of closing experience in B2B SaaS, MarTech, or digital services

- Proven track record hitting/exceeding quota in a high-velocity sales environment

- SMB sales chops—you know how to build urgency, handle objections, and close without lengthy procurement cycles

- Consultative selling skills—you diagnose before prescribing and can articulate ROI clearly

- Comfort with ambiguity—you’re joining an early-stage startup where adaptability matters

- CRM proficiency (Zoho, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) and strong process discipline

- Excellent English communication skills for engaging with global prospects

- Want to hustle like crazy to hit the numbers!



Bonus Points For:



- Experience selling to manufacturers, distributors, or industrial/B2B companies

- Background in SEO, content marketing, or lead generation solutions

- Track record in 1-3 call close environments

- Familiarity with AI-powered products

- Experience selling to US/international markets



What We Offer:



- Accelerators for over-quota performance—top performers earn significantly more

- Qualified pipeline delivered daily by our BDR team—focus on closing, not prospecting

- Fast feedback loops—short sales cycles mean you learn and earn quickly

- Career growth—as we scale, top performers move into senior AE or team lead roles

- Equity in a VC-backed rocketship

- Collaborative, high-performance culture where wins are celebrated and losses are learning 
nts

- Remote work



Our Sales Process



- BDR books qualified meeting ? hands off to you

- Call 1: Discovery (30-45 min) - understand business, pain points, buying process

- Call 2: Demo + Proposal (45-60 min) - tailored walkthrough, ROI discussion, pricing

- Call 3 (if needed): Negotiation/Close - handle final objections, terms, signatures

- Handoff to Growth Manager for onboarding



How to Apply

* Send your most updated resume to
