title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Cold Caller/Property Acquisition Specialist
description:
Distressed Property Acquisition Specialist



(Cold Caller & Closer | Real Base + Industry-Leading Commission | Build a Career, Not Just a Pipeline)



Are you ready to prove you can do it all—and be paid like you do?



Most of our top performers out-earn their base pay every month in commissions—because they produce, and they stay.

We’re building a long-term team of operators who own their pipeline, close their own deals, and grow with us as we scale.



What You’ll Do



100+ live outbound calls/day to distressed property owners (unpaid taxes, inherited, title issues, etc.)



Full-cycle ownership: From first contact through negotiation to close—no handoffs, no excuses



Pipeline management: You track every lead, every call, and every deal in real-time



Performance-driven: All numbers are tracked and visible; your income and advancement are tied to your results, not time-in-seat



What You Get



Real base pay (not a draw): To guarantee you’re supported while building your pipeline



Uncapped commission: Most of our best people double or triple their base every month—if you’re a producer, this is your arena



Leads, data, tech, and process: We remove the excuses; you bring the execution



Real growth: Producers become leaders, trainers, territory managers—if you prove it on the board, you move up fast



Long-term seat: We invest in those who consistently hit metrics and want a sales career, not a short-term gig



Who Succeeds Here



Operators who track their own numbers—and love the scoreboard



Professionals who crave direct feedback, thrive in a transparent environment, and want to build something, not just “do deals”



Anyone who’s performed in cold calling, full-cycle closing, and wants to see their income tied directly to what they produce



Who Shouldn’t Apply



Anyone needing long ramp-up, daily encouragement, or a “team sell” structure



People uncomfortable with public, daily reporting or being held to exact standards



Anyone not ready to own the whole pipeline—from hello to close



How to Apply (Must Complete Both Steps):



Resume: Clearly showing outbound calling and closing experience (include your highest daily call and deal numbers)



2-minute, unscripted voice memo: (no script, no edits)



Your name, country, and your personal record for calls in a day



Walk us through your best cold-to-close deal ever (steps, negotiation, and outcome)



Your personal system for tracking numbers and pipeline daily



Why you want a long-term, high-commission, high-performance sales seat—not “account management” or “just a job”



Applications missing either item, or not following instructions, will be rejected without review.



Bottom Line



If you’re a true operator who wants income, a real seat, and a future in a company that pays for performance—this is your next home.

If not, don’t apply.

title: eCommerce Accounting Analyst(part time)
description:
Job Title: eCommerce Accounting Analyst(part time)



We are a rapidly growing eCommerce company seeking a highly analytical and detail-focused Accounting Analyst to play a key role in our month-end close and financial reporting processes. This position is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced small business environment and has a strong foundation in accounting, data validation, and technical reporting across multiple sales channels.



Key Responsibilities

Month-End Close & Reconciliation:

 Take ownership of the month-end close process by reconciling revenue,  fees, refunds, and settlements across multiple eCommerce platforms, including Amazon, eBay, Walmart, Shopify, Kohl’s, TikTok Shop, Target Plus, Michaels, Etsy, OTC, and Faire.





Excel & SQL Analysis:

 Utilize advanced Excel functions (Pivot Tables, Power Query, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, data models) and basic SQL queries to clean, analyze, and audit large data sets for trends, anomalies, or mismatches.



Data Validation & Integration:

 Collaborate closely with the internal database team to validate raw data exports and financial reports, ensuring accuracy before importing into QuickBooks Desktop using specialized import tools or templates.







QuickBooks Posting & Reconciliation:

 Import validated data into QuickBooks, allocate properly to accounts, and reconcile against previous balances, account summaries, and transaction-level reports.





Documentation & Issue Tracking:

 Maintain detailed documentation for recurring discrepancies, resolution steps, data anomalies, and improvements to workflows for internal knowledge sharing and continuity.





Cross-Team Coordination:

 Communicate proactively with purchasing, operations, and customer service teams to resolve financial discrepancies and plan ahead for financial cutoffs or reporting deadlines.





Problem Solving with Strategic View:

 Identify gaps in current workflows and propose automation or procedural enhancements without losing sight of overall financial objectives and timelines.





Night Shift Availability:

 Must be available to work during night hours to support collaboration with global tea
mbers and to meet reporting deadlines aligned with operational needs.







Qualifications

Education:

 Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.





Experience:

 Minimum of 2 years of hands-on accounting experience, preferably in an eCommerce, retail, or multi-channel environment involving platform settlements and large transaction volumes.





Technical Skills:





Advanced Excel: Proficiency in Pivot Tables, Power Query, data clean-up and reconciliation workflows





SQL (Basic): Ability to write or modify queries to extract or check data from internal databases





QuickBooks Desktop: Familiarity with posting, importing transactions, and reconciling accounts





Communication & Organizational Skills:





Able to communicate clearly and effectively via Google Chat, Gmail, Google Calendar, and shared spreadsheets





Excellent attention to detail with the ability to manage priorities and meet tight deadlines





Work Style:

 Self-motivated, able to work independently, and comfortable in a fast-changing, team-oriented, small business environment.







If you’re passionate about using your accounting and data skills to bring clarity to complex multi-platform eCommerce operations, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Transaction Coordinator - Real Estate - Virginia, USA
description:
Transaction Coordinator & Client Care



Attention to Detail Wizards & Masters of Organization!



Are you the type of person who gets a thrill from checking off tasks, hitting deadlines, and making sure NOTHING falls through the cracks? Do you find joy in organizing chaos and keeping everything (and everyone) on track? If the thought of juggling multiple contracts, deadlines, and details excites you rather than terrifies you… keep reading. If not, you should probably hit the back button now.



Who We Are Looking For:

We are a residential real estate team in Northern Virginia, USA. We’re on the hunt for a Transaction Coordinator who is obsessed with details, thrives on structure, and communicates like a pro. You’ll be the glue that holds our real estate transactions together—keeping our agents, clients, and vendors aligned so deals close smoothly and on time.



Our ideal candidate LOVES systems, checklists, and keeping everything buttoned up. If your idea of a nightmare is an inbox full of unanswered
s and missed deadlines, this is NOT the role for you. But if you live for order, process, and making clients feel like VIPs, you’ll fit right in.



What You’ll Be Doing (AKA Your Superpowers)

-Managing every detail of the contract-to-close process, from executed agreements to closing day.

-Keeping agents on track with deadlines so NOTHING gets missed (we’re talking inspection dates, contingencies, appraisals, and more).

-Communicating with buyers, sellers, lenders, title companies, and agents to ensure a stress-free experience for all.

-Double (and triple) checking documents for accuracy, because missing a signature is NOT an option.

-Proactively solving problems before they become real issues (because putting out fires is NOT fun).

-Delivering white-glove client service so every buyer and seller feels like they’re your #1 priority.

Keeping all transaction records organized, up to date, and easy to find.



What You Need to Bring to the Table

-Obsessive Attention to Detail – You notice the small things others miss.

-Top-Tier Communication Skills – You can write and speak professionally but also warmly and clearly.

-Time Management Ninja Skills – You can juggle multiple transactions, deadlines, and people without breaking a sweat.

-Problem-Solving Mindset – You don’t just report problems; you figure out solutions.

-Tech-Savvy – You’re comfortable with CRMs, transaction software (Dotloop, Skyslope, etc.), and Google Workspace.

-Customer Service Excellence – You genuinely care about people and making their experience smooth and stress-free.

-High Accountability & Ownership – You don’t need someone chasing you down to meet a deadline—it’s already done.



Who This Job is NOT For:

-People who need constant supervision to stay on task.

-Those who get easily overwhelmed when multiple deadlines hit at once.

-Anyone who is "kinda detail-oriented" (we need FULLY detail-obsessed).

-Someone who sees problems and waits for someone else to fix them.

-People who just want to clock in and out without truly owning their role.

Perks of Joining Our Team:

-Work with an amazing team who values and appreciates what you do.

-Systems and processes that help you work smarter, not harder.

-The satisfaction of being the behind-the-scenes hero in every transaction.

-Competitive pay and the opportunity to grow with a high-performing team.



You’ll be working US EST hours with some flexibility required.  Direct real estate TC experience is a must, and your application will stand out if you’ve worked in Virginia before.



If you read this and thought, "This is literally me!", we want to hear from you. But if you read this and felt exhausted just thinking about it… trust us, you won’t love it here.



To apply, send us your resume and a quick note about why you’d be an amazing fit. Bonus points if you include an example of a time your attention to detail saved the day!

title: Video Editor for Popular Travel YouTube Channel
Distribution Specialist
description:
Company: BriarBear

Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time



About this Role



We are hiring a Distribution Specialist to own and drive organic growth for a portfolio of

AI-powered digital products.



BriarBear builds consumer products, SaaS tools, and mobile apps that all have AI at their

core—AI chatbots with proprietary knowledge bases, AI-powered matching, and intelligent

workflows. These products live or die by distribution, and today, distribution is dominated by

TikTok and Instagram Reels.



This role is responsible for turning business goals (traffic, users, revenue) into clear growth

strategies, then driving a creative team to execute those strategies while measuring what

works and what doesn’t.



This is not a hands-on video editing role.

This is not a purely creative role.

This is a strategy, execution, and accountability role focused on:

- Impressions

- Traffic

- Conversion

- Revenue impact



What You’ll Be Responsible For



1. Own Organic Growth Strategy (TikTok & Reels First)

- Develop and continuously refine organic growth strategies primarily for:

- TikTok

- Instagram Reels

- Stay current on:

- Viral formats

- Hooks

- CTAs

- Platform-specific best practices

- Study and apply learnings from growth-focused resources (e.g., Social Growth

Engineers and similar newsletters).



You are expected to know why something works—not just that it worked.



2. Translate Business Goals Into Measurable Growth Targets



You will take high-level goals such as:

- “300,000 monthly unique visitors to a website”

- “Drive signups for a consumer AI product”

- “Recruit both sides of a marketplace”



And translate them into:



- Monthly impression targets

- Posting cadence requirements

- Funnel assumptions (impressions ? clicks ? users ? customers)

- Clear milestones (e.g., 0 ? 100K ? 300K ? 3M impressions)

You are accountable for defining the path, not just executing tasks.



3. Funnel Thinking & Conversion Optimization



- Design and test content strategies that convert:

- Impressions ? website visits

- Website visits ? signups

- Signups ? paying customers

- D
 and test:

Direct CTA vs. curiosity-based CTA

- Comment-driven discovery vs. link-out traffic

- Website vs. app store routing

- Monitor conversion rates at each stage and adjust strategy accordingly.

You must understand that views without conversion are failure, not success.



4. Lead and Direct the Creative Team



- Work with video editors and scriptwriters to:

- Set creative direction

- Define hooks, angles, and CTAs

- Ensure output meets quality and brand standards

- Review content before it goes live to ensure:

- Clean grammar

- Good taste

- Proper framing and cuts

- No careless errors

- Push the team to execute faster and smarter when data shows something is working.

This role requires strong judgment and the ability to give clear, direct feedback.



5. Measurement, Reporting, and Iteration



- Track and report on:

- Impressions

- Click-through rates

- Conversion rates

- Cost per result (organic and paid when applicable)

- Identify winning formats and double down.

- Kill underperforming ideas quickly.

- Share insights with leadership regularly.

If growth stalls, you own diagnosing why and proposing a fix.



6. Product-Specific Growth Strategies



You will manage growth across multiple products, each with different audiences and

strategies, including:

- Consumer AI chatbots

- SaaS tools

- Mobile apps

- Marketplace-style products (e.g., job boards)



Example:

- Using Filipino UGC content to recruit job seekers locally

- Using different messaging to attract U.S.-based employers

- Tailoring content strategy by product, audience, and funnel stage



7. Paid Growth (Later Stage)



- Once organic traction is established, assist with:

- Testing paid ads on TikTok, Instagram,
, and

- Defining metrics like CPM, CAC, and ROAS

- Organic-first mindset, paid second.



Who You Are



- Strategic thinker with a strong bias toward execution

- Comfortable owning numbers and being accountable for outcomes

- Able to give and receive direct feedback

- Obsessed with learning what makes content convert—not just go viral

- Organized, detail-oriented, and quality-driven

- Comfortable working closely with leadership

- Fluent in English (written and verbal)



Required Skills & Experience



- Proven experience in:

- Social media growth

- Product marketing

- Performance or growth marketing

- Deep familiarity with:

- TikTok and Instagram Reels ecosystems

- Organic content distribution

- Strong understanding of:

- Funnels

- Conversion metrics

- Audience targeting

- Experience managing or directing creative teams

- Comfortable working graveyard shift aligned with US-based teams



Nice to Have (But Not Required)



- Experience marketing apps or SaaS products

- Experience launching products from zero

- Familiarity with UGC-driven growth

- Data analysis or experimentation background

- Experience scaling from low traction to high-volume reach



Why This Role Matters



This role directly determines:

- Whether products succeed or fail

- Whether the company grows sustainably

- Whether creative effort turns into real business outcomes

title: Mid/Senior Wordpress Developer (PHP/JS/CSS)
description:
We're an established Digital Marketing Agency based in Denver, Colorado and looking to expand our development team. We’re looking for an experienced WordPress developer to join our team on a full-time basis.



The role will involve working across a range of WordPress websites, handling both frontend and backend development. Day-to-day work will include fixing bugs, making updates, building new pages, improving existing layouts, and helping with the build of full websites when needed.



You’ll need to be comfortable working with PHP, JavaScript and CSS, as well as WordPress themes, plugins and page builders. We’re looking for someone who can troubleshoot issues properly, communicate clearly, and work reliably during our core hours of 8:30am to 4:30pm Mountain Time (Denver).



Requirements

- Strong applied experience working on the Wordpress platform

- Good working knowledge of PHP, JavaScript and CSS

- Confident working on both frontend and backend tasks

- Able to fix bugs and troubleshoot issues across themes, plugins and custom functionality

- Comfortable building pages and full websites in WordPress

- Experience with page builders, particularly Divi, Elementor and Bricks

- Strong communication skills

- Reliable internet connection

- Able to work 8:30am to 4:30pm Mountain Time (Denver)

- Organised, dependable and able to manage workload properly



Advantageous Skills

- Experience working on other platforms such as Webflow, Squarespace, Shopify and Django

- WooCommerce experience

- Experience working across multiple client websites

- Pagespeed Optimization





Salary is upto $2000/m dependant on experience, shortlisted applications will need to complete an interview and a paid test.

title: Technical Project Manager
description:
We’re an established Digital Marketing Agency based in Denver, Colorado and we’re looking for a highly organised Technical Project Manager to join our team on a full-time basis.



This role will involve managing the day-to-day workflow of our development team across a range of websites and digital projects. You’ll be responsible for organising tasks, assigning priorities, keeping projects moving, following up with developers, and making sure work is completed properly and on time.



You’ll need to understand web development well enough to communicate clearly with developers, break work down into manageable tasks, and spot when something needs more detail or clarification. This role is not for a hands-on developer, but it does require someone who understands how development projects work and can manage them confidently.



We’re looking for someone who is extremely organised, proactive, detail-oriented, and confident using tools like Asana and Slack. Clear communication is essential, along with the ability to keep multiple moving parts under control without things slipping.



Requirements

Strong experience managing development or digital project workflows

Very organised and able to manage multiple projects at once

Experienced using Asana, Slack, and similar project management tools

Able to assign work clearly and keep developers accountable

Good understanding of web development processes and terminology

Able to communicate confidently with developers and non-technical tea
mbers

Strong attention to detail

Able to prioritise tasks and manage deadlines properly

Reliable internet connection

Able to work 8:30am to 4:30pm Mountain Time (Denver)

Dependable, proactive and good at keeping things moving



Nice to have

Experience working in a digital agency environment

Familiarity with WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, Squarespace, or other website platforms

Experience working with designers, developers and marketing teams together

Experience helping scope projects or review requirements before development starts

Basic understanding of frontend and backend development

Experience managing website builds, maintenance tasks and bug fixing workflows



Salary / Hiring Process

Salary is up to $2,000 per month depending on experience. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to interview and complete a paid test.

title: Client Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Success Coordinator supports client onboarding and Client engagement within the 10X Business Academy. This role helps ensure clients and their teams stay on track with their learning programs by monitoring participation, coordinating touchpoints, and maintaining accurate client records. The Coordinator works closely with the Client Success Manager to identify engagement risks early, maintain proactive communication, and contribute to strong client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Clients remain actively engaged in programs with strong participation and course completion.

• Client questions and requests are addressed quickly and professionally.

• Engagement data and client records are accurate, organized, and consistently updated.



OBJECTIVES

• Support onboarding of new clients by coordinating kickoff activities and tracking setup completion.

• Monitor Client engagement metrics such as participation, attendance, and course progress.

• Conduct scheduled check-ins and follow-up communication with clients.

• Maintain accurate client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Identify disengagement risks early and escalate them to the Client Success Manager.

• Prepare engagement summaries and progress reports for leadership review.

• Coordinate scheduling for kickoff calls, accountability sessions, and coaching meetings.

• Assist with renewal preparation by compiling engagement insights and participation data.

• Performs other related duties as assigned.



COMPETENCIES

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

• Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

• Professional and client-focused approach to communication and service.

• Ability to track engagement data and recognize participation trends.

• Strong time management and follow-through on commitments.

• Comfortable working with CRM systems, learning platforms, and productivity tools.

• Ability to work independently while collaborating with a remote team.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Communications, Education, or a related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience working with global clients or remote teams is a plus.

• Familiarity with CRM systems or online learning platforms is preferred.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Senior HMO Property Manager
description:
Job Title: Senior Property Manager – UK HMO Portfolio

Location: Remote – Philippines

Job Type: Full-time

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 08:00 am to 6:00 pm GMT, with flexibility to respond to urgent operational matters and out-of-hours emergencies where required

Salary: ?70,000 per month





Start Date: Immediate

Experience Required: UK HMO / shared housing / UK property management experience only





Job Description

We are a UK property business managing a large portfolio of shared houses and HMOs. We are looking for one strong, experienced Property Manager based in the Philippines to take ownership of up to 75 rooms across multiple houses.

We want someone who already understands the UK property market, knows how shared housing operates, and can manage a high-capacity portfolio properly without needing repeated explanations.

Your job is to keep the portfolio running tightly from end to end. That means handling tenant issues, maintenance follow-up, contractor chasing, check-ins, check-outs, operational coordination, internal records, and keeping things moving without delays or excuses.

You will also be expected to coordinate and direct local managers or on-ground support where needed so that tasks are not just discussed remotely but are actually completed properly in the field.

This role is for someone who can take ownership, handle volume, make sensible decisions, follow through properly, and keep houses, tenants, landlords, and operations under control.







What You Will Be Responsible For

You will be responsible for:

Managing the day-to-day operations of up to 75 rooms across a UK HMO and shared housing portfolio.

Handling tenant issues, maintenance coordination, contractor follow-up, check-ins, check-outs, and issue escalation across all assigned properties.

Keeping communication active and organised across
, phone, WhatsApp, internal systems, and trackers.

Monitoring maintenance and property issues and ensuring they are pushed through to completion, not left half-done or sitting without updates.

Working with contractors, cleaners, and local support staff to make sure work is carried out properly and on time.

Appointing, coordinating, or directing local managers or field support for tasks that require physical presence, follow-up, or verification on the ground.

Maintaining accurate internal records, logs, and updates so the business always has visibility on what is happening across the portfolio.

Keeping landlords and internal management informed where needed, flagging issues early, and avoiding last-minute surprises.

Operating with judgement, ownership, urgency, and common sense in a fast-moving portfolio environment.





Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who has already worked in UK property management and understands the pace and reality of managing shared housing or HMO stock.

You should be:

Comfortable handling a large number of moving parts at the same time

Able to chase, escalate, organise, prioritise, and close loops

Someone who does not need basic explanations of how UK property operations work

Naturally responsible, organised, and able to keep things under control without drift





Essential Requirements

You must:

Have direct experience in UK property management

Have experience managing HMOs, shared housing, student accommodation, co-living, or similar high-volume UK residential portfolios

Have handled a meaningful number of rooms, units, or houses and be able to explain your exact day-to-day responsibilities clearly

Have strong written and spoken English

Be highly organised, operationally sharp, and confident working independently

Be comfortable dealing with tenants, contractors, local teams, and internal stakeholders

Be comfortable working UK hours full-time from the Philippines

Have a proper remote setup, including stable internet, a reliable laptop, and backup arrangements





Important Note

Please do not apply if your experience is only:

General virtual assistant work

Basic real estate admin

Non-UK property support

We are only interested in candidates with real UK market exposure and genuine experience handling operational property work at scale.







How to Apply

 your CV to 
 with the subject line:

Senior Property Manager – Philippines

Along with your CV, you must send a short video introduction.

Your video should answer all of the questions below.

Please keep it direct, professional, and in clear English.





In your video, answer the following:



Explain your current or most recent role

What direct experience do you have in UK property management, especially HMOs, shared housing, student accommodation, or co-living

What is the largest number of rooms, units, or houses you have personally managed at one time

What exactly were you responsible for day to day? Please be specific

Have you worked in a role where you were expected to take ownership without constant supervision? Give one real example

Have you handled a high-volume portfolio where multiple issues happened at the same time? How did you stay organised

What systems, CRMs, trackers, or property software have you used before

Why do you believe you are suitable for a role managing up to 75 rooms in a UK HMO portfolio





Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER
description:
Job Title: Social Media Content Manager

Location: Remote 

Job Type: Full-Time 



About Us:

We are a fast-growing digital creator brand operating multiple channels across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, and
. Our content includes family entertainment, challenges, vlogs, skits, pranks, slime content, and lifestyle videos. We are looking for a Social Media Content Manager who can oversee all posting, platform organization, scheduling, and audience engagement across short-form and long-form content.



Position Overview:

The Social Media Content Manager will be responsible for managing our entire social ecosystem. This includes posting, scheduling, optimizing content, writing titles/captions, monitoring trends, engaging with our audience, reminding the team to capture photos/videos, and ensuring consistent daily activity on all platforms. You will work closely with our creators, editors, and content team to keep content flowing smoothly.



Responsibilities:

• Content Posting & Scheduling

• Post all short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube • • • Shorts,
 Reels, Snapchat Spotlight).

• Post all long-form content on YouTube and
 when needed.

• Upload and schedule posts at the optimal times for each platform.

• Maintain a cross-platform posting calendar.

• Ensure all drafts are properly captioned, titled, tagged, and ready for posting.



Content Management:

• Remind the team daily to take photos, behind-the-scenes, and spontaneous content.

• Organize and manage content folders from editors and creators.

• Track what has been posted, what’s scheduled, and what still needs to be filmed.

• Request additional footage from creators when content gaps appear.



Audience Engagement:

• Respond to comments, messages, and community interactions across all platforms.

• Monitor trending comments or feedback and report insights to the team.

• Encourage audience engagement through questions, CTAs, and community polls.



Optimization & Strategy:

• Research and stay up to date with social media trends, audios, formats, and hashtags.

• Track analytics to determine the best posting times, top-performing content, and weekly growth.

• Write engaging titles, captions, and thumbnail text that improve retention and click-through.

• Identify content opportunities from trends and present weekly ideas to the team.



Brand & Platform Consistency:

• Keep messaging consistent across all accounts.

• Ensure all posts represent the brand voice and style of the creators.

• Maintain an organized archive of previous posts for reference.



Daily Tasks:

• Post content across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, Snapchat, and
.

• Upload long-form videos as needed and optimize titles/descriptions.

• Remind creators to take photos and videos throughout the day.

• Engage with audience comments and messages.

• Track performance of yesterday’s posts.

• Update the content calendar with new posts, drafts, and scheduled items.

• Review trending audios, 
s, and formats for potential use.





Weekly Tasks:

• Prepare and present a weekly social media performance report.

• Review analytics and refine posting times/tactics accordingly.

• Meet with the content team to plan weekly filming needs.

• Pull the best photos and clips for next week’s posts.

• Create draft captions, titles, and posting templates.

• Identify weekly trends relevant to our brand.

• Maintain organization of all content folders and archives.

• Suggest 5–10 new short-form content ideas per week.



Qualifications:

• 1–3 years of social media experience (creator or influencer marketing preferred).

• Strong understanding of TikTok, YouTube, Instagram,
, and Snapchat algorithms.

• Excellent writing skills (titles, captions, descriptions).

• Ability to multitask and stay extremely organized.

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, content-heavy environment.

• Knowledge of trending audios, formats, 
 culture, and viral-style editing.





KINDLY DO THE TRIAL TASK:



• Complete a real-world scenario based on supporting Ameerah. The scenario would be busy content week travel, brand deals, and multiple posts due and your task is to create a 1-week organized plan. This should include a content calendar (Tiktok, Youtube Shorts, Instagram), a simple daily schedule for the creator and a checklist of tasks.

Send/Attached the Google Drive link of your output along with your application.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist (Remote)
description:
Zest Digital Marketing



At Zest Digital Marketing, we are not looking for someone who simply runs ads.

We are looking for someone who can turn ad spend into measurable profit.



If you have strong hands-on experience with Google Ads, a data-driven mindset, and a proven track record of delivering results, this opportunity is for you.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, execute, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max)



Analyze campaign performance and continuously improve CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates



Manage and scale advertising budgets effectively



Conduct A/B testing on ads, landing pages, and funnels



Collaborate with the team to enhance overall marketing performance



Requirements



Minimum 2+ years of hands-on experience with Google Ads



Proven experience managing significant ad budgets with clear results



Strong understanding of tracking systems (GA4, Conversion Tracking, GTM is a plus)



Performance-driven mindset with a focus on ROI, not just traffic



High level of responsibility, proactivity, and problem-solving skills



What Makes Us Different



Results-focused environment with no micromanagement



Opportunity to work on international projects with real budgets



Performance-based evaluation, not time-based



Clear growth path in performance marketing



Compensation and Benefits



Competitive salary based on experience and performance



Performance-based bonuses



Opportunity to grow into a leadership role



How to Apply

Please send your CV (and portfolio or case studies if available) to:





Subject line: Senior Google Ads Specialist – Your Name



If you are confident in your ability to generate real results from paid advertising, we would like to hear from you.

title: Experienced Real Estate Transaction Manager/ Listing Coordinator
description:
PLEASE READ FULL DESCRIPTION AND FOLLOW APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS FOR CONSIDERATION



ABOUT US:

We are currently seeking 1-2 motivated and experienced Real estate Listing Manager/ Transaction Coordinator professionals as a dedicated hi-level support staff  for our Real Estate Team.  This is a full time position and the intention is for this to be a long term role.  Our current support staff have all been with us 3+ years.  



JOB OVERVIEW:

This position requires an experienced and highly skilled candidate who will primarily focus on supporting the real estate transaction process, ensuring smooth and timely closings. Previous Listing coordinator and MLS experience and in depth knowledge of the contract to close process is REQUIRED. Please do not apply if you do not have high level, hands on Listing and Transaction management experience. We are not looking fort general support.  Experience with eXp Systems is a plus. You’ll also provide general administrative support. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who is detail-oriented, highly organized, and looking to grow in the real estate industry.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Transaction Management: Oversee and support the full real estate transaction process from contract to closing, including coordinating timelines, documents, and communication between agents, clients, and other parties.

- MLS Listings: Create and manage property listings on Multiple Listing Services (experience with OneKey/HGAR MLS is a plus)

- Property Descriptions: Write compelling and accurate property descriptions to showcase listings.

- Administrative Support: Assist the with tasks such as managing
 inquiries, organizing documents, and scheduling appointments.

- Social Media & Content Creation: Post and create content for listings  on social media platforms.

- Client and Partner Outreach: Manage outbound calls, texts,
s to agents, attorneys, lenders and clients to assist in deal follow ups and transaction management



LOOKING FOR:

- Minimum 1 year of real estate experience, preferably with eXp Realty systems like SkySlope.

- Previous direct support of top producing listing agents managing listings from start to finish.

- In depth understanding of the Real Estate transaction contract to close process

- Experience with managing and responding to communications on behalf of CEO

- Ability to manage 20+ transactions at once and keep track of changing status and priorities. 

- Strong proficiency with Google Drive, MLS, CRM, Canva and eXp tools.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

- Highly organized, quick thinking and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously.

- A positive, team-oriented attitude with a strong desire to grow and succeed in the real estate industry.



APPLICATION (MUST BE FOLLOWED IN DETAIL OR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED):

 
 The Following:

- Completed DISC Assessment.  Please use this test: 
/VO/5af434e1/en

- Resume

- Contact Info for Previous Real Estate Agent or Team Leader you supported

- Screenshot of your Internet Speed Test: 
/

- Screenshot of 1 Minute Typing Test Results: 
/student/tests

- 2-3 minute VIDEO recording about yourself, detailing why you would be a good fit for this position.

- Include A 1,000-character property description of this home:

title: X (Twitter) News Poster — Crypto / Markets / Economy (High-Speed)
description:
I’m launching a new X 
) news account covering Crypto, Money, Markets, Economy and Politics.



This role is for someone who can operate like a real time news desk: staying on top of the latest developments and posting quickly, clearly, and consistently.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Track breaking news across crypto + macro + markets

- Identify what’s truly important (and what has viral potential)

- Post fast (quickest on the whole platform), clean updates throughout the day (high quality images, quick, good copywriting)



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE

- Always online mindset (active 18 hours+ of the day)

- Strong instincts for what will go viral vs what’s noise

- Very fast at spotting news + turning it into a clear post

- Excellent English (short, punchy, error-free)

- Good eye for selecting high-quality images quickly

- Reliable, consistent, disciplined



REQUIREMENTS

- Interested in crypto + markets + current events

- Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment where speed matters

- Strong judgment: accuracy + credibility first

- Stable internet connection

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer. You will be responsible for bringing our brand to life through high-quality visual content across digital and print platforms. The ideal candidate has a strong eye for clean aesthetics and can translate ideas into engaging designs.



Key Responsibilities:

* Brand Assets: Create logos, icons, and brand guidelines.

* Digital Content: Design social media graphics (IG, FB, LinkedIn),
 headers, and web banners.

* Marketing Collateral: Develop flyers, brochures, and digital PDFs.

* Photo Editing: Retouch and enhance images for professional use.

* Collaboration: Work with the team to ensure consistent branding across all channels.



Requirements:

* Portfolio: A strong portfolio showcasing a variety of design work (Required).

* Minimum of 3+ years working experience in Graphics Designing and Editing

* Software Mastery: Expert proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and/or Canva.

* Visual Eye: Strong understanding of typography, layout, and color theory.

* Communication: Ability to take feedback and iterate on designs quickly.

* Reliability: Able to meet deadlines and work independently in a remote environment.



Preferred Skills (Nice-to-Have):

* Experience with basic video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro).

* Knowledge of UI/UX principles.

* Experience designing for E-commerce brands.

* Detailed Portfolio

* 3+ Years or more working experiences



To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."

title: Customer, Lead Response & Appointment Scheduling
description:
Role Overview: 

The primary focus of this role is responding quickly to incoming leads, contacting the prospect, and booking appointments. This Virtual Assistant will monitor incoming leads, immediately call prospects, answer basic service questions, and guide them toward scheduling an estimate or service appointment. The ideal candidate is excellent on the phone, organized with CRM systems, and comfortable managing customer conversations while scheduling appointments efficiently.



Primary Responsibilities

1. Lead Response & Appointment Booking (Top Priority)

* Receive incoming leads from platforms such as:

 - Angi

 - Thumbtack

 - Google Local Services Ads (LSA)

 - Website inquiries

 - Social media inquiries

* Respond to new leads quickly to ensure fast engagement

* Call prospects to introduce the company and understand their service needs

* Answer basic service questions and handle high-level pricing conversations when appropriate

* Guide prospects toward booking:

 - In-person estimates

 - Service appointments

 - Estimates that may include same-day service if approved

* Enter and manage lead details in the CRM

* Ensure every lead receives prompt and professional follow-up

The primary goal is turning inbound leads into scheduled appointments.



2. Customer Communication & Appointment Management

* Schedule new appointments for estimates or services

* Send appointment confirmations via phone, text, or

* Follow up with customers prior to scheduled appointments

* Re-book or reschedule appointments when necessary

* Conduct post-appointment follow-ups when appropriate

* Maintain professional and friendly communication with all prospects and customers



3. CRM Management

* Manage customer records and opportunities within the CRM

* Update lead status and appointment details

* Track communications and follow-ups

* Maintain accurate and organized records

The primary CRM used is Workiz, so experience with Workiz is highly preferred. However, candidates with experience using other CRM platforms are also encouraged to apply.



Tools & Systems:

Preferred experience with:

* Workiz CRM (ideal)

* Other CRM systems (HubSpot, Jobber, ServiceTitan, Salesforce, etc.)

* Phone and SMS communication systems

* Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

* Appointment scheduling tools



Ideal Candidate Profile:

The ideal candidate will be:

* Excellent on the phone with strong communication skills

* Comfortable engaging new leads and guiding conversations toward booking

* Highly responsive and organized

* Experienced with CRM systems

* Able to manage multiple leads and follow-ups efficiently

* Professional, friendly, and customer-service oriented

* Experience supporting home services companies (cleaning, restoration, plumbing, HVAC, etc.) is a strong advantage.





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



Podio Form Link:

title: Full-Stack Developer (Crypto + AI Automations) — Long-Term Role
description:

title: Marketing & Customer Experience Virtual Assistant
description:
We are seeking a proactive, organized, and customer-focused Virtual Assistant to support both digital marketing presence and customer follow-up systems. This role blends social media management, reputation oversight, and digital content creation with customer outreach, follow-up calls, and referral support. The ideal candidate is both creative and structured — someone who can grow the brand online while ensuring no customer falls through the cracks. This role directly supports revenue growth, reputation management, and long-term customer relationships.





Core Responsibilities:



1. Social Media & Content Management

* Manage consistent posting on
 and Instagram

* Repurpose job site photos/videos into branded content

* Edit short-form videos (Reels, Stories, etc.)

* Write engaging captions aligned with brand voice

* Maintain a content calendar

* Monitor comments and messages and respond professionally



2. Reviews & Online Reputation

* Monitor Google,
, and other review platforms daily

* Draft thoughtful responses to positive and negative reviews

* Flag recurring issues or urgent concerns

* Manage Real Works Dashboard and website widgets



3. Customer Follow-Up (Happy Calls)

* Make same-day or next-day satisfaction calls after service visits

* Confirm service quality and overall experience

* Document feedback in CRM / ServiceTitan

* Escalate issues when necessary



4. Estimate & Sales Follow-Up

* Call customers who received estimates but have not scheduled

* Confirm receipt and answer basic questions

* Identify objections or next steps

* Route warm leads back to office/sales team



5. Referral & Membership Support

* Help execute and track referral programs

* Maintain membership records and engagement notes

* Support customer appreciation initiatives (cookouts, thank-you campaigns)

* Assist with invitations, tracking, and follow-up communication



6. Administrative & Systems Support

* Maintain accurate customer records

* Support scheduling and coordination

* Track follow-ups to ensure nothing falls through the cracks

* Assist with reporting and basic analytics tracking



Tools & Systems:

*
 & Instagram Business Tools

* Canva / CapCut or similar content tools

* ServiceTitan (strong bonus)

* CRM / Contact databases

* Google Workspace

* Phone systems and call logging tools



Skills & Qualifications

* Strong phone presence and customer communication skills

* Organized and highly detail-oriented

* Comfortable making outbound calls

* Experienced with social media content management

* Self-starter who can manage deadlines independently

* Experience in home services (plumbing/HVAC) a plus

* ServiceTitan experience a strong bonus

title: Sr. Graphic Designer
description:
Senior Graphic Designer (Social Media & Motion Graphics) — US Agency (Remote / Philippines)

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based marketing and media group working with home service brands (roofing, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, etc.) and sports brands (athletes, academies, sports technology companies, and sports marketing agencies).

We are looking for a Senior Graphic Designer based in the Philippines who can create high-quality static and motion graphics for social media, digital campaigns, and marketing funnels.  Additionally, they have branding experience and can create beyond just social media graphics, and outside of Figma.  The use and leverage of Ai is important while having the expertise to create award-winning level graphics.

This is a full-time, long-term role for someone who takes pride in speed, creativity, and execution.

________________________________________

Role Overview

As our Senior Graphic Designer, you will be responsible for designing scroll-stopping social media creatives, motion graphics, branding assets, and campaign visuals that directly support marketing performance and lead generation.

You will work closely with our U.S. marketing, media, and leadership teams and must be able to work U.S. Eastern Standard Time hours.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Design static social media graphics (ads, reels covers, carousels, thumbnails, story posts, banners)

• Create motion graphics / animated social posts / short-form video graphics

• Produce creative assets for paid advertising campaigns (Meta, YouTube, Google Display, etc.)

• Design graphics for home service contractors (roofing, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, etc.)

• Design graphics for sports brands (teams, academies, athletes, equipment brands, sports tech companies)

• Follow brand guidelines while also contributing creative direction

• Quickly iterate on designs based on performance feedback

• Maintain organized file structures and naming conventions

• Meet deadlines consistently in a fast-paced agency environment

• Collaborate with marketing strategists, video editors, and copywriters

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Minimum 3–5 years of professional graphic design experience in an agency environment

• Strong portfolio showing social media design and motion graphics work

• Experience designing for lead generation campaigns or performance marketing

• Experience working with home service brands OR sports brands is strongly preferred

• Ability to work full U.S. EST hours

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow creative direction, without being micro-managed

• Familiarity or willingness to learn ClickUp project management tool

________________________________________

Required Software & Tools

You must already have strong working experience with:

• Adobe Photoshop

• Adobe Illustrator

• Adobe After Effects or similar motion graphics software

• Adobe Premiere Pro or equivalent video tools

• Canva (advanced level)

• Figma (preferred)

• Google Drive / Slack / project management tools

You must have reliable high-speed internet and a professional workstation capable of handling motion graphics work.

________________________________________

What Success Looks Like in This Role

• Designs that improve ad performance and engagement

• Fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality

• Ability to handle multiple brands and campaigns simultaneously

• Strong creative instincts combined with marketing awareness

• Proactive communication with the U.S. team

________________________________________

How To Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, you must include ALL of the following in your application:

1. Your updated resume

2. A portfolio link (Google Drive / website / Behance / etc.) that clearly shows:

o Static social media designs

o Motion graphics / animated posts

o Any work for contractors or sports brands (if available)

o Branding work such as logos, etc. if applicable

3. A short video message explaining:

o Your experience working with U.S. clients

o Your experience working EST hours

o Your strongest design software

o Why you’re the perfect candidate

Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

________________________________________

If you are a high-performance designer who wants long-term stability, challenging creative work, and growth with U.S. brands, we want to hear from you.

title: Experienced TikTok and Instagram Influencer Specialist – Amazon Ecommerce (Day/Night Shifts)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company based in California.



We are actively looking for a Tiktok influencer expert to join our growing team. You MUST have 2 years of prior work experience in Tiktok Influencer Research, Outreach, Influencer Marketing Manager, and be a self-starter. If you have strong expertise in managing social media ads, we are looking for you! Experience matters. Please don't apply if you don't have any experience.

This is a high-growth position.



If you would like to apply, please answer the questions below and send them to 
 NOT APPLY if you do not have work experience in Influencer Research, Outreach, Influencer Marketing Manager*****



JOB OVERVIEW:

1) Research TikTok and Instagram influencers who are best suited for our product niche and who have high engagement rates

2) Create a list of these highly targeted influencers (name, location, number of followers, engagement rate,
 address, etc.)

3) Reach out to the influencers via
 to promote our products

4) Collaborate and negotiate with influencers to make a deal. Please specify what kind of deals you have made with influencers before

5) Track influencers' posts on their social media.



If you have real-world experience for the above criteria, please send a Loom video to showcase your experience and send it to

Influencer Marketing, Instagram marketing Tiktok Ads

title: Marketing Specialist
description:
About Us

Month2Month is a fast-growing hospitality and property management company focused on maximizing occupancy, optimizing listing performance, and delivering exceptional guest experiences across all platforms.





Role Summary

As an Omnichannel Marketing Specialist, you are responsible for maximizing the visibility, search ranking, and click-through performance of property listings across Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, ShowMojo, and MLS.



Your core objective is to drive traffic ? improve ranking ? increase click-through rate ? support occupancy growth.



You will operate as the digital merchandiser of our portfolio, using data-driven strategies, platform algorithms, and visual optimization to improve listing performance and minimize vacancy.



This is a highly execution-driven role, not a branding or social media position.



Key Responsibilities



1. Omnichannel Listing Optimization & Merchandising



 Continuously audit and optimize listings across Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, ShowMojo, and MLS

 Ensure 100% listing coverage for:

 All vacant homes

 Homes becoming vacant within ?7 day

 Select and sequence the top 5 listing photos to maximize CTR:

 Focus on bright living areas and bedrooms

 Build a strong visual “story” for first impression

 Apply standardized cover image badges to improve click-through performance

 Create and relaunch listings for underperforming properties:



 Ensure accurate policies (pet rules, smoking, utility caps, tenant requirements)

 Maintain consistency across platforms



2. Cross-Channel Pricing & Promotion Strategy

 Execute pricing strategies across channels:

 Airbnb / VRBO ? seasonal and demand-based pricing

 Zillow / Direct ? competitive long-term positioning

 Apply targeted discount rules to stimulate traffic and bookings

 Support long-term (3+ months) pricing and promotion strategies

 Manage “Urgent Homes” portfolio:

 Daily optimization (pricing, photos, titles, positioning)

 Focus on traffic recovery and vacancy reduction



3. Data Analysis & Performance Optimization



 Track key funnel metrics daily:

 First Page Impressions

 Listing Views

 Click-Through Rate (CTR)



 Identify underperforming listings and take corrective actions



 Continuously test and iterate:

 Photo order

 Pricing adjustments

 Listing content



4. Reporting & Insights



 Submit a Daily Performance Report including:

 Traffic and listing performance

 Lead volume across channels

 Key actions taken and results

 Provide insights and recommendations to improve listing performance and occupancy



Description



Month2Month is a performance-driven organization where listing visibility and traffic directly impact occupancy and revenue.

As an Omnichannel Marketing Specialist, you will play a critical role in managing and optimizing how our properties are presented across all platforms.

This is not a traditional marketing role focused on branding or social media. Instead, it is a hands-on execution role focused on platform algorithms, listing performance, and measurable results.

You will be expected to take ownership of listing performance, proactively identify opportunities, and continuously improve metrics such as impressions, CTR, and traffic.



We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented, data-driven, and highly responsive, with the ability to execute quickly and consistently.



Required Qualifications



 Bachelor’s degree or above

 Experience in property management, short-term rental, hospitality, or related industry

 Strong attention to detail and execution ability

 Data-driven mindset with ability to interpret performance metrics

 Ability to manage multiple listings simultaneously

 Strong sense of urgency and ownership

 Comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment



Preferred Qualifications



 Experience with Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, or similar platforms

 Understanding of platform ranking algorithms and listing optimization

 Familiarity with AI tools for:

 Listing content generation

 Workflow automation

 Basic design skills (Canva, Photoshop) for image enhancement and badges

 Experience with A/B testing or performance optimization

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Land Investing & Lead Generation)
description:
**Title:**

Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Land Investing – Data & Lead Generation)



**Description:**

We are a growing real estate investment business focused on buying and selling vacant land in the United States (PA, WV, AL, TN).



We are looking for a **detail-oriented Virtual Assistant** to help us find and organize land deals. This is a long-term position with opportunity for growth as the business scales.



If you are organized, reliable, and good with data, this could turn into a stable, long-term role.



---



**Responsibilities:**



* Pull vacant land property lists using tools like PropStream

* Clean and organize data (remove duplicates, filter bad records)

* Research property values using Zillow, Redfin, and county websites

* Assist with lead generation (mail, text, or
 campaigns)

* Track and update leads in spreadsheets or CRM

* Follow clear step-by-step processes



---



**Requirements:**



* Strong attention to detail (VERY important)

* Experience with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

* Good written English

* Ability to follow instructions and processes

* Reliable internet connection

* Able to work independently



---



**Nice to Have (Not Required):**



* Real estate or land investing experience

* Experience with PropStream or similar tools

* Experience with lead generation or data scraping



---



**Work Schedule:**



* Part-time to start (10–20 hours per week)

* Opportunity to increase hours based on performance



---



**Pay:**



* Based on experience ($4–$8/hour to start)

* Opportunity for raises and bonuses based on performance



---



**How to Apply:**



To apply, please follow these steps EXACTLY:



1. Start your application with the word: **“LAND”**

2. Tell us about your experience with data or real estate (if any)

3. What tools have you used before? (Excel, Google Sheets, etc.)

4. Why would you be a good fit for this role?

5. What is your internet speed?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



---



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with the business. If you are reliable and do great work, this role will expand over time.

title: 3D Interactive Artist: 50-Asset
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled 3D Artist (Blender/Spline specialist) to build a complete interactive 3D product library for a high-end candy brand. We have a diverse range of packaging—including pouches, boxes, tins, and novelties—that need to be converted into web-ready 3D assets featuring a "Candy Fall" physics animation.



The Inventory Breakdown:

The project consists of creating 14 Master 3D Templates and then performing approximately 50 "Label Swaps" (variations) across those templates.



Pouches: Large & Small (9 designs each - same shape, different sizes/labels).



Boxes: 3 Large (with windows), 6 Medium, 2 Freeze-Dried (same shape, different labels).



Novelties: 5 Candy Canes, 1 Candy Sleigh, 1 Footage Box, 3 Candy Tins.



Containers: 2 Candy Buckets (2 sizes), 2 Candy Tubs (2 sizes).



Specialty: 1 Glass Straw, 1 Giant Pouch, 1 Mega Pouch, 1 Advent Calendar, 1 Pick & Mix Spinner.



Logistics: 5 Shipping Boxes (different sizes).



Core Tasks:



3D Modeling: Build high-quality, low-poly 3D models of the 14 master shapes.



Texture & Transparency: Apply realistic "crinkle" plastic and cardboard textures. Use Transmission/Refraction for transparent windows so candy is visible inside.



Physics Animation: Set up a "Candy Fall" simulation (3-5 candy types) where sweets fall from the top and settle realistically inside the hollow containers.



Batch Production: Perform the ~50 label swaps using provided 2D packaging assets.



Virtual Photography: Render 3 high-res static "Hero Shots" (Front, Side, 45°) for all 65+ total variations.



Technical Deliverables:



Web-Optimized Files: Final assets must be delivered in .GLB (glTF 2.0) or Spline scene format.



File Size: Strict limit of under 5MB per asset (using Draco compression and texture baking).



Compatibility: Must be compatible with modern web engines (Three.js/Webflow/Framer).



Required Skills:



Expertise in Blender (specifically Rigid Body physics and Mesh Colliders).



High-level texturing in Substance Painter or similar.



Experience with Web-3D Optimization (Baking lighting, UV unwrapping for batch swaps).



Ability to manage a large file library with organized naming conventions.



Budget & Application:

This is a bulk project. Please provide a quote based on a "Master Template Fee" + a "Flat Rate per Label Swap." Location Preference: Philippines-based freelancers/studios.



To Apply:

Please send your portfolio link. Must include at least one example of a 3D asset that can be viewed/rotated in a web browser.

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:

Qualifications



Proven experience in U.S. credit repair or credit dispute processing (2+ years preferred).



Strong understanding of FCRA, FDCPA, and related U.S. consumer credit laws.



Exceptional written English and attention to detail.



Familiarity with popular credit repair tools/software (e.g., DisputeFox, Credit Repair Cloud, Client Dispute Manager).



Organized, proactive, and results-focused.



Preferred Skills

Experience handling multiple client accounts simultaneously.



Perks & Benefits



Competitive pay based on experience.



Flexible remote work schedule.



Opportunity to grow with a U.S.-based company.

title: Job Opportunity: Internal Auditor for Mental Health Facility Operations (Non-Clinical Staff)
description:
We are actively looking for a highly organized and experienced Internal Auditor to evaluate the day-to-day operations of our non-clinical staff in a high-volume mental healthcare setting. This position focuses on auditing administrative activities—not provider documentation or clinical decisions.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Audit employee workflows related to insurance verification, billing, intake coordination, scheduling, and general front/back-office processes.

 • Evaluate productivity metrics across departments to assess performance trends and team efficiency.

 • Identify discrepancies, gaps in process adherence, or workflow breakdowns that may affect compliance or revenue cycle integrity.

 • Review and report on timeliness, accuracy, and completeness of non-clinical documentation and staff interactions with EHR or billing systems.

 • Collaborate with management and QA leadership to present findings, highlight risks, and recommend improvements or corrective action plans.



Ideal Candidate:

 • Has hands-on experience auditing mental health facility operations, especially in areas such as billing, insurance verification, intake, or administrative compliance.

 • Understands payer guidelines, authorization protocols, and documentation standards for non-clinical roles in behavioral health.

 • Is data-driven, highly detail-oriented, and able to navigate EHRs and internal systems with ease.

 • Can objectively assess individual and team performance and communicate findings in a clear, constructive way.



Preferred Qualifications:

 • Prior auditing or quality assurance experience in a behavioral health or medical office setting.

 • Knowledge of HIPAA, VOBs (Verification of Benefits), patient intake processes, and insurance follow-ups.

 • Familiarity with productivity KPIs and reporting in healthcare administration.



What You Can Expect:



You’ll be part of a mission-driven team working to ensure our behind-the-scenes operations support the best possible patient experience. This role plays a key part in protecting revenue integrity and improving staff accountability—without being involved in patient care or provider oversight.

title: Airbnb Host Outreach Specialist — Commission, Remote
description:
About Us

We are a UK-based serviced accommodation and holiday let management company. We help Airbnb hosts maximise their rental income by taking over the full management of their properties — from guest communications and pricing optimisation to cleaning, maintenance, and everything in between. We are expanding our client base and looking for driven, self-motivated individuals to help us connect with hosts who could benefit from our services.



The Role

This is an outreach role. Your job is simple: find Airbnb hosts in the UK who are underperforming or overwhelmed, reach out to them, and introduce our management services. For every host you successfully onboard as a client, you earn $65 USD. There are no fixed hours — you work when you want, as much or as little as you want. Your earnings are entirely in your hands.



What You'll Be Doing

Identifying Airbnb hosts in the UK whose listings show signs of underperformance — poor photos, inconsistent pricing, low review scores, gaps in their calendar, or slow response times. Reaching out to these hosts directly through the Airbnb platform to introduce our services and start a conversation. Explaining the benefits of professional management and how we can improve their occupancy, revenue, and guest reviews. Nurturing leads through follow-up messages until they are ready to speak with our team. Handing over warm, qualified leads to our onboarding team to close.



Requirements

Strong written English with a persuasive, professional tone. Self-motivated and comfortable working independently with no supervision. Familiarity with how Airbnb works, what makes a listing perform well, and what pain points hosts commonly face. Based anywhere, but must be comfortable targeting UK-based hosts and understanding the UK short-term rental market.



Compensation

$65 USD per successfully onboarded client. No cap on earnings — the more hosts you bring on board, the more you earn. Expected 1h per day. Base of $1/h.



Who This Is For

This role suits someone who is entrepreneurial, persistent, and good at starting conversations. Maybe you already work in the property or hospitality space and want a side income stream. Maybe you are a freelancer looking for flexible commission work. Either way, you understand that outreach is a numbers game and you are not put off by rejection. You know how to craft a message that gets a response, and you are genuinely interested in helping hosts improve their business — not just sending copy-paste spam.



How to Apply

Send us a short message confirming you have access to an Airbnb account you can use for outreach, along with a brief note on any relevant experience you have in sales, outreach, or the short-term rental space. If you have done similar work before, let us know your results.

title: AI Mockup Designer – Storefront Signage (Lovart / AI Rendering / Mockups)
description:
Overview



We are a signage company that designs and installs 3D LED storefront signs for businesses. Before producing a sign, we send potential clients a realistic AI-generated mockup showing how their new logo signage could look on their storefront.



We are looking for a detail-oriented AI Mockup Designer who can create clean, realistic storefront renderings with 3D signage using AI tools such as Lovart and other image generation tools.



Your job is to take a real storefront image and a logo and generate sales-ready visualizations of how a new 3D sign could look on the building.



This is not graphic design only — the key skill is creating convincing architectural mockups using AI rendering tools.







Your Responsibilities



You will receive:



• A real storefront photo

• A company logo

• Instructions about the signage



Your job is to:



Recreate the storefront as a clean rendering-style image



Generate 3D sign versions from the logo



Place the signs onto the storefront realistically



Produce multiple sign variations (day & night versions)



Ensure the mockups look professional and realistic enough to show clients







Example of Work



Typical output includes:



• realistic storefront mockups

• front-lit 3D channel letter signs

• day and night lighting versions

• accurate logo proportions

• realistic shadows and mounting



The final result must look like a real installed sign.







Tools



Preferred tools:



• Lovart AI

• ChatGPT (for prompt refinement)

• Photoshop / Photo editing software

• Vector software (Illustrator or similar)







Requirements



You must:



• Be experienced with AI image generation

• Be able to write or refine prompts

• Understand basic perspective and lighting

• Have strong attention to detail

• Follow clear instructions precisely

• Organize files properly



Experience with signage, architectural visualization, or product rendering is a plus.







Output Requirements



For each project you will produce:



• multiple storefront mockups

• day and night lighting versions

• different signage styles

• a vector file of the sign layout with dimensions







Important



Accuracy matters.



Logos must match exactly.

Signs must look realistically mounted.



These images will be shown directly to potential customers.
